title: Brown shooting videos show malicious intent and awkward gait — clues to identify him: body language expert
content: Fox News Channel offers its audiences in-depth news reporting, along with opinion and analysis encompassing the principles of free people, free markets and diversity of thought, as an alternative to the left-of-center offerings of the news marketplace. Surveillance video released in the hunt for the Brown University gunman shows a stocky, masked figure whose walk shifts from calm to restless and awkward — behavior a body language expert says signals classic 'anomalies' seen in people acting with malicious intent. 'From a behavioral perspective, looking around, pacing and placing hands behind the back have been associated with many loitering-type behaviors and active surveillance of the environment rather than traveling through an area,' said Susan Constantine, who is also a certified and licensed trainer in threat-assessment behavior. 'This is consistent with behavior anomalies in persons of malintent.' She told Fox News Digital that he appeared 'focused on a destination' in early clips, which were recorded before the shooting. 'He's scouting and in rehearsal,' she said, regarding the earlier clips. 'He is walking the paths out, could be timing routes, CCTV cameras.' title: 澳洲血案...父子案前詭赴菲律賓待近1個月
content: 國際中心/綜合報導 澳洲雪梨邦代海灘日前發生該國近30年來最嚴重的大規模槍擊案,造成16人死亡(包含一名槍手)及42人受傷。澳洲警方透露,恐怖分子父子檔沙吉德・阿克拉姆(Sajid Akram,50歲)和納維德・阿克拉姆(Naveed Akram,24歲),在案發前一個月曾持印度護照前往菲律賓,目前澳洲和菲律賓當局正聯手追查兩人當時的行蹤與目的。 根據綜合外媒報導,新南威爾斯州警方證實,這對父子檔在11月曾從雪梨飛往菲律賓。菲律賓移民局發言人桑多瓦爾(Dana Sandoval)進一步透露,父親阿克拉姆為澳洲居民、印度籍人士,並持印度護照入境菲律賓;而兒子納維德則出生於澳洲,是澳洲公民。 對此,菲律賓當局證實,阿克拉姆父子於11月1日持印度護照入境菲律賓,申報最終目的地為菲律賓南部城市達沃市,隨後他們從達沃轉機至馬尼拉,並於11月28日搭機返回雪梨。沒想到,僅約兩週後,兩人便犯下這起駭人聽聞的槍擊案。 澳洲執法當局證實,凶嫌父子疑受到極端伊斯蘭國(IS)意識形態的影響,且在兒子納維德的車上查獲兩面IS旗幟,這讓警方高度懷疑兩人前往菲律賓是否與此極端意識形態有關聯。 據報導,菲律賓境內過去曾有與IS相關的組織活動,尤其在南部民答那峨島地區,儘管近年影響力已被削弱,但仍有零散的小規模組織存在,警方目前正將調查重點放在這趟菲律賓之行是否與恐攻訓練或組織聯繫有關。

title: David Manheim Says Nick Reiner Never Seemed Capable of Murder
content: Dopey Podcast host David Manheim says Nick Reiner never struck him as capable of murder as questions swirl over the deaths of his parents, Rob and Michele Reiner The “Dopey Podcast” creator and host David Manheim is sharing his experience with Nick Reiner after the screenwriter will be charged with the murders of his dad, Rob Reiner, and mom, Michele Singer Reiner. “The last time he called in, he spoke about being on coke and violently destroying his parents’ guesthouse,” Manheim exclusively tells Us Weekly. “But still that is not the same as violence towards another person. He never struck me as someone who was capable of murder.” “He seemed to bounce around between a bunch of treatments, so he was resentful of that,' Manheim adds, later noting, 'I think it's very common to have animosity towards their parents.” Nick, 32, was a guest on “Dopey,” a self-help and comedy podcast about personal experiences with substance abuse and addiction, in 2018. At the time, he opened up about once destroying Rob and Michele’s guest house while he was high “on meth.” “I went 10 rounds in my guest house,” he said. “It’s not much of a story. I got totally spun out on uppers — I think it was coke and something else — and I was up for days on end. I started punching out some things in my guest house.”“Everything in the guest house got wrecked,” he continued. “I literally punched the TV.” While Nick admitted that there was “no logic” behind his outburst, he recalled being “pissed” that his...

title: Pork roll in LA
content: The most important stories for you to know today Proudly Serving's Jersey Burger features pork roll, American cheese, a half-fried egg with runny yolk and ketchup on a Martin's potato bun.Proudly Serving in Hermosa Beach is bringing pork roll — aka Taylor Ham, the polarizing processed meat that's a New Jersey breakfast staple — to L. A. on Thursday, wrapped up in a smash burger. Owner Matt McIvor, who grew up in Sayreville, N.J., and has been eating the salty-sweet mystery meat since childhood, is serving his Jersey Burger with pork roll, egg and cheese.The past few times McIvor has featured the burger at his monthly Kegs and Eggs event series, including a collaboration with Jersey-born chef Eric Greenspan, it drew lines before doors opened. McIvor is hoping for the same kind of passion this time.This isn't just about a burger — it's about whether hyperlocal foods can translate beyond their borders without losing what makes them special. For Jersey expats, it's a rare taste of home in a city where bagels and pizza finally have gotten good but pork roll remains practically mythical. For everyone else, it's a chance to understand what all the fuss is about — a food that splits an entire state down the middle over what to call it.But now, pork roll, the sweet-and-salty breakfast meat that's been a New Jersey deli staple for over a century, is being given a smash burger makeover by a West Coast chef., a burger joint with locations in Hermosa and Redondo Beach, will serve a...

title: Venezuela urges UN to condemn US 'theft' of oil tanker
content: Caracas asks the UN Security Council to denounce the seizure of a Venezuelan tanker by US forces in the Caribbean. Venezuela has urged the United Nations Security Council to condemn what it described as the United States’ 'theft' of an oil tanker seized in the Caribbean last week, according to a letter from the foreign ministry. In the letter addressed to Samuel Zbogar of Slovenia, which holds the rotating presidency of the Security Council, Venezuela called on the body to denounce what it described as 'state-sponsored piracy' and the 'illegitimate use of military force against a private vessel.'Caracas also demanded that the United States release crew members it said had been 'kidnapped' following the seizure.The complaint comes amid heightened tensions between Washington and Caracas.Continued US pressurePresident Donald Trump’s administration has stepped up pressure on Venezuela in recent months, including a major naval build-up in the Caribbean.The US military campaign has included strikes on suspected drug-trafficking boats, which Venezuelan officials say have killed at least 95 people.Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro has accused the United States of using anti-narcotics operations as a pretext to undermine his government and seize the country’s oil resources.He has said the increased US military presence near Venezuela is part of a broader effort to destabilise his rule.Last week, US forces seized a Venezuelan tanker that Washington said was transporting oil sold on...

title: The Post's NBA MVP rankings: Where Jalen Brunson stands among the league's best
content: Mike Brown is on the trail, stumping for Jalen Brunson as MVP — a smart move on his part. LAS VEGAS — It’s smart for a coach to stump for his players. title: Alexa Plus’s website is live for some users
content: Alexa has a new home online The Alexa.com website appears to be live for some users. The browser-based home for Alexa Plus, the company’s revamped digital voice assistant, was first announced at the Alexa Plus launch event in February. But until recently, Alexa.com redirected to an information page. Now, some users, myself included, are seeing a new Alexa Plus web interface. Today, when I typed Alexa.com into my web browser, it took me to a page that resembled the Alexa Plus chatbot in the Alexa app. I went through a few setup steps, then arrived at a large blue/white screen with a big “Hello Jen, how can I help?” prompt above a text box. The box has the option to upload a file, and there are links to drop-down menus below: Plan, Learn, Create, Shop, and Find. The menus include prebuilt prompts that take you into the chatbot interface, such as “Plan for my next getaway,” “Create a study guide for my exam,” “Shop trending products,” and “Book a table for a restaurant.” At the bottom of the chatbot, in small type, is the warning: “Alexa may not always get it right.” A toolbar on the left has shortcuts to recent chats , access to controls for my smart home , my calendar, my Alexa lists, reminders, and tasks, plus a files section. The last one lets you access any files or photos you’ve uploaded to Alexa Plus, as well as the emails you’ve sent to it — all features that arrived with the new assistant. Many of these are things Alexa Plus can do on its Echo devices and in the app —...

title: Trump Sues BBC for $10 Billion Over Defamation and Deceptive Practices
content: Former President Donald Trump filed a lawsuit against the BBC seeking $10 billion in damages, alleging defamation and unfair trade practices related to the broadcaster's documentary on him. The suit centers on the BBC's editing of a January 6, 2021 speech, which Trump claims misrepresented his words and aimed to influence the 2024 U.S. presidential election. The BBC had previously apologized for the edit but denied defaming Trump. President Donald Trump filed a lawsuit Monday seeking $10 billion in damages from the BBC , accusing the British broadcaster of defamation as well as deceptive and unfair trade practices.The 33-page lawsuit accuses the BBC of broadcasting a “false, defamatory, deceptive, disparaging, inflammatory, and malicious depiction of President Trump,” calling it “a brazen attempt to interfere in and influence” the 2024 U. S. presidential election.It accused the BBC of “splicing together two entirely separate parts of President Trump’s speech on January 6, 2021” in order to ”intentionally misrepresent the meaning of what President Trump said.”The BBC had apologized last month to Trump over the edit of the Jan. 6 speech. But the publicly funded broadcaster rejected claims it had defamed him, after Trump threatened legal action.RELATED STORY | Trump threatens to sue WSJ, says Bondi can seek to have Epstein records releasedBBC chairman Samir Shah had called it an “error of judgment,” which triggered the resignations of the BBC’s top executive and its head of...

title: Protesters at ICE offices in San Francisco chain themselves to entrance
content: Protesters chained themselves together in front of a federal immigration services building in San Francisco on Tuesday morning, prompting authorities to shut down the building for the day. Protesters chained themselves together in front of a federal immigration services building in San Francisco on Tuesday morning, prompting authorities to shut down the building for the day. Dozens of religious leaders were taken away in handcuffs after blocking the front doors of the U. S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement field offices on Washington Street near the city's Financial District. Protestors blocked the entrance for about five hours, beginning at about 6 a.m. until federal police arrived. About 150 to 200 protesters massed outside the U.S. Appraisers Building on Washington and Sansome streets, a frequent target for protesters where the ICE offices are housed along with U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services field offices. Not everyone at the protest was detained, only those who were blocking the doors with bolt-locked chains, said CBS News Bay Area reporter Kevin Ko, who was at the scene.Advocacy group Bay Resistance said in a prepared statement that the action was geared toward 'stopping ICE from abducting community members at their immigration check-ins.' The group said 42 people were arrested, cited and released. title: 7 Crucial Lords of the Rings Stories Only Revealed After Tolkien’s Death
content: Tolkien's massive body of work was mostly published after his death, including some of Middle-Earth's best stories. J.R.R. Tolkien stands as the undisputed architect of modern fantasy, creating a literary legacy that has defined the genre for nearly a century. Whileachieved massive success during his lifetime, they represented only a fraction of the mythology he spent decades constructing. Tolkien was a notorious perfectionist who constantly revised his work, crafting entire languages, genealogies, and historical timelines that never saw the light of day before his passing in 1973. This unparalleled dedication to detail resulted in a legendarium that feels like a genuine history of a lost world rather than simple fiction. Consequently, the vast majority of Middle-earth’s rich history remained hidden in boxes of disorganized notes and manuscripts, known only to the author and his closest confidants.It fell to his son and literary executor, Christopher Tolkien, to undertake the monumental task of deciphering, editing, and publishing these lost tales over the subsequent decades. This posthumous library has proven essential for audiences hungry for more content, especially following. These publications provide the necessary context for the wars and alliances seen on screen, transforming Middle-earth from a setting for an adventure story into a living universe with thousands of years of lore. Without these posthumous releases, our understanding of the One Ring, the Wizards, and...

title: Queen’s Greatest Song Almost Didn’t Become a Single — Another Song Was Almost Released Instead
content: Queen Days of Our Lives TV Movie Being known for iconic hits such as “Don’t Stop Me Now” and “We Are The Champions”, Queen has released hit after hit. However, when discussing their greatest song of all time, it is, without a doubt, “Bohemian Rhapsody”. Unfortunately, not everyone agreed, as the band’s label, EMI, resisted releasing it as a single. Instead, the band almost released “The Prophet’s Song” as the lead single for A Night at the Opera. Queen's "Bohemian Rhapsody" Was Almost Not a Single “Bohemian Rhapsody” took seven years to make, and even after all that time, Queen’s label was still hesitant to release the six-minute epic. The song was a concept before Queen formed, as it was a song that Mercury had been working on since he was studying at London’s Ealing Art College. “Bohemian Rhapsody” was recorded in several studios, but the labels still did not see it as a single. “Bohemian Rhapsody” had a lot of pushbacks for one key reason: the song is six minutes long, and the label felt that it was less likely to achieve radio play. It did not meet the three-minute slot that a lot of songs had during that time. Instead, they had to find another song to release as the lead single for A Night at the Opera. The band had options, such as Brian May’s “I Love My Car” and John Deacon’s “You’re My Best Friend,” but “The Prophet’s Song” was the song that was almost a single, even though it was longer than"Bohemian Rhapsody". However, “Bohemian Rhapsody” was the song that the band...

title: Chicago finance panel advances opposition budget plan amid looming deadline
content: Articles and videos about Chicago finance panel advances opposition budget plan amid looming deadline on FOX 32 Chicago. With the city inching closer to a government shutdown, Chicago officials still have no budget agreement in sight.The City Council returned to negotiations Tuesday, raising the question of whether another round of deal-making will finally produce a compromise. A freshly drafted alternative budget proposal cleared a key hurdle Tuesday, advancing out of the City Council’s Finance Committee on a 22–13 vote. Opposition alderpersons formally introduced the plan before the committee, proposing to eliminate a higher garbage collection fee and revise a rideshare congestion fee. Their plan would add a 5-cent bag tax and generate revenue by selling advertising space on bridge houses and light poles.Allies of Mayor Brandon Johnson urged caution, asking for time to review the competing proposal before any vote.Opposition members said their top priority is preventing a corporate head tax they argue would stifle job growth. Johnson has stood firmly behind the tax, which would impose a $33-per-employee fee on companies with more than 500 workers. The mayor maintains there is no evidence the measure would harm Chicago’s economy.Opposition alderpersons now appear to hold a clear majority and may be nearing the 34 votes required for a supermajority capable of overriding a potential mayoral veto.City officials must approve a budget by the end of the year. title: High school football: IHSA expands football playoffs to include a total of 384 teams
content: The Illinois High School Association approved 12 amendment proposals on Tuesday, with one of the proposals expanding the number of teams in the high school football playoffs by over 100 teams. The Illinois High School Association approved 12 amendment proposals on Tuesday, with one of the proposals expanding the number of teams in the high school football playoffs by over 100 teams.The IHSA's approved proposal expands the IHSA football playoffs to 48 teams per classification, starting in the 2026 season. In the 2025 season, there were 32 playoff teams per classification. This means there will be 128 more teams in the IHSA playoffs next season, for a total of 384 teams. Also included in this change is an amendment to the start of the season. The official start of the ISHA football season remains the same. In 2026, the season opens on August 10. However, the first slate of regular-season games has been moved up. Teams will play a week earlier. In 2026, that's August 20. This eliminates the Week 0 scrimmages.In a statement, the IHSA recognized how this might cause short-term issues for some schools and conferences. But, the hope is it will stabilize scheduling in the long-term.Also included in the 12 approved amendments is the establishment of a "No Contact Week" which will fall during Fourth of July week. This means schools can't practice, scrimmage, have open gyms or allow training during this week. The IHSA will also move the start of the boys volleyball season up one week....

title: Detained immigrant at center of public spat with feds to be released, Utah lawyer says
content: Tim Vandenack covers immigration, multicultural issues and Northern Utah for KSL. He worked several years for the Standard-Examiner in Ogden and has lived and reported in Mexico, Chile and along the U.S.-Mexico border. SALT LAKE CITY — The Mexican immigrant at the center of public wrangling last week between the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the man's Utah lawyer should soon be freed from the immigration detention facility where he's being held. Adam Crayk, the attorney representing Jair Celis, says an immigration judge heard the case Monday, allowing the transplant to Utah to post bond so he can be released pending resolution of the matter. Celis, now living in Utah and married to an American woman, faces deportation but also has a pending application for U.S. residency."The immigration judge found that he was not a danger to the community or a flight risk and granted his bond request," Crayk said. Bond was set at $5,000.Speaking Tuesday morning on the KSL NewsRadio program "Inside Sources," Crayk said the bond funds should be transferred soon to the Department of Homeland Security, allowing for Celis' release Tuesday or Wednesday from the San Luis Regional Detention Center in San Luis, Arizona.Celis was detained in early December by Immigration and Customs Enforcement officials at the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services offices in Salt Lake City when he showed up for an appointment as part of his efforts to secure legal permanent residency. title: You Can Thank This Classic Batman Episode for the Modern, Gritty Alfred Pennyworth We Have Today
content: Sean Pertwee as Alfred Pennyworth in Gotham Television has always been better at planting ideas than taking credit for them. Long before prestige drama made darkness feel mandatory, older shows were already slipping complexity into places audiences weren’t trained to notice. The Cold War anxiety running through Mission: Impossible, the identity games of The Prisoner, even the polished menace beneath The Avengers’ wit all worked because they trusted viewers to pick up what wasn’t overt. The 1966 Batman rarely gets included in that lineage. Its reputation is a loud, colorful, proudly unserious, pop-art riff. But watching it now, especially alongside Gotham, Christopher Nolan’s Dark Knight films, or The Batman, something else creeps in. Beneath the jokes and deadpan sincerity is a real concern with discipline, secrecy, and the ability to compartmentalize emotions. That undercurrent becomes clearest not in Bruce Wayne or Batman, but in the man standing just off to the side, holding the house together. One episode, “Fine Finny Fiends,” ends up feeling like an early sketch of the Alfred Pennyworth audiences would eventually come to know. Alfred's Hardened Personality Comes Naturally in 'Batman' In the episode, the Penguin’s scheme is elaborate and theatrical. He infiltrates the Multimillionaires' Annual Award Dinner by kidnapping and brainwashing Alfred to uncover the secret location and time, then replaces the event's charity beauty queen with his own accomplice, Finella . title: USC starting quarterback Jayden Maiava is returning for the 2026 season
content: USC is retaining starting quarterback Jayden Maiava, who passed on entering the NFL draft and will provide stability for the Trojans' offense. USC’s starting quarterback is returning for another season in 2026. Jayden Maiava made it official Tuesday as the school announced that he had re-signed with the program for the upcoming season, his third with the Trojans. Maiava led USC to a 9-3 record in his first full season as starter after taking over the job during the final month of the 2023 season. He threw for 3,431 yards, 23 touchdowns and eight interceptions. He also added six scores on the ground. Maiava struggled in each of the Trojans’ three losses on the road in 2025. But when asked about his progress last month, Trojans coach Lincoln Riley credited Maiava for leading “one of the best offenses in the country.” “He’s been a big part of that,” Riley said. “He’s playing good. He’s still learning. He can play better. But he’s continuing to give us chances to win every week.” Maiava did improve significantly from his redshirt sophomore season, raising his completion rate nearly 7% while adding two yards per pass attempt. His strong performance was enough to raise questions of whether Maiava might declare for the NFL draft. Some prognosticators viewed Maiava as one of the better potential quarterback prospects in a draft especially thin on passers. title: Chef seriously injured in stabbing attack outside his home, forcing popular Loop restaurant to close
content: Customers are raising money for Chef M's medical expenses. Customers are raising money for Chef M 's medical expenses.A brutal attack on the head chef of a popular restaurant in the Loop has forced that business to close its doors. ABC7 reviewed surveillance video that captured the moment three men attacked Saucy Porka 's Chef M while he was getting home from work back in October. He says one man had a knife, stabbing him in the back in the Back of the Yards neighborhood.Chef M says he has no idea why anyone would attack him."I've been in the hospital for eight days," he said. The Oct. 24 attack also damaged the nerves in hands. The damage has kept him from doing what he loves: being in the kitchen. "It takes the people that love you the most, to tell you that you need to take time for yourself," said Saucy Porka owner Amy Le. Le says she has worked with Chef M for over a decade. He helped build her business from a food truck to three locations: two in Chicago and one in St. Louis. But being without him means she is forced to close the location on the corner of Franklin and Van Buren. "It's the people you work with every day that become your family, and it's your whole life. And to watch it close after 13 years, even though we have the other location, it's still an end to this chapter that you've built," Le said. title: San Antonio fights to keep rainbow crosswalks as TxDOT reviews exception requests
content: SAN ANTONIO -THE TEXAS DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION HAS REPORTEDLY DENIED THE CITY OF SAN ANTONIO'S REQUEST TO KEEP THE PRIDE DISTRICT’S RAINBOW CROSSWALKS.THI The Texas Department of Transportation has reportedly denied the City of San Antonio's request to keep the Pride District’s rainbow crosswalks. SAN ANTONIO - The Texas Department of Transportation says they are still reviewing the City of San Antonio's request to keep the Pride District’s rainbow crosswalks, saying the request lacked a compliance document. The rainbow crosswalks have been at the center of a battle between the city of San Antonio and the state of Texas regarding road safety and political expression. The crosswalks, installed in 2018 at North Main Avenue and Evergreen Street to symbolize inclusion in the city, could be removed by Jan. 15. This comes after Governor Greg Abbott’s order to remove “any and all political ideologies” from Texas streets, saying their distracting and unsafe. The city had originally requested an exemption from the state, but that request was denied, according to a November letter. TxDOT told the City of San Antonio that it did “not consider this exemption request acceptable,” citing the lack of “a signed and sealed document by a traffic engineer stating that the crosswalks are in compliance with” federal traffic safety standards. On Tuesday, TxDOT told News 4 San Antonio/Fox SA, that they are still reviewing the city's request for an exception to keep the crosswalks in place....

content: The third annual NBA Cup final takes place on Tuesday night. The 2025 NBA Cup wraps up on Tuesday with a final matchup between the Spurs and Knicks. This is a significant change from a year ago, when the NBA Cup final was broadcast nationally on ABC. This year, Prime Video has begun broadcasting NBA games nationally for the first time, and that includes the NBA Cup final.Both the Spurs and Knicks will be financially incentivized to win the NBA Cup final. That’s what you’ll find at thefeatures a collection of 5,000 miniatures ranging from Barbie-sized pieces to thimble-sized and even smaller. In the land of miniatures, a 1:6 scale means that one unit on the model equals six units in real life, so if something is six feet tall in life, it would be one foot tall among miniatures.Visitors will see scaled-down versions of American life, including something as routine as a man reading a newspaper with his trusted dog by his side in pristine detail, to a whimsical garden where Cabbage Patch Kids grow. There are mansions and messy attics, strolls in the park, manicured lawns, and everything in between.So far, we’ve shown you miniature houses, gentle giants, sculptures, cool museums, and funky folk art. title: Why We Should Be Talking About Heat As The Weather Cools
content: Extreme heat is the deadliest weather-related threat in the U.S., and important decisions to prevent it are made when temperatures are cold. Why planning now matters. A man shovels the snow in the Hamilton Heights neighborhood in the Manhattan borough of New York City on December 14, 2025. Many parts of the country are currently locked in a deep cold snap. Pipes are freezing, heating bills are climbing, and emergency crews are focused—rightly—on winter risks. But this stretch of bitter cold also marks the most important time to prepare for a very different threat—extreme heat.than hurricanes, floods and tornadoes combined. The real toll is even higher, since heat often worsens heart and lung conditions rarely recorded as “heat-related” on death certificates. Yet the most consequential decisions about heat—how cities are built, how homes are upgraded and how health departments prepare—need to be made when temperatures are falling, not rising.Every fall, attention to heat fades with the temperature. Public budgets shift, emergency plans wind down and research funding gets reallocated. And over the past year, the Trump Administration has proposed and implemented several billion dollars of cuts to science funding, affecting research programs in climate, environment, health, and other areas.to the National Science Foundation, NIH and NASA. Those reductions would not just affect academic projects—they would weaken early-warning systems, heat-risk forecasting and research that...

title: The gas corridor sanctions forgot: Tehran’s quiet expansion into Turkey
content: Turkey’s 2026 decision is an inflection point. Western policy can begin closing one of the Islamic Republic’s remaining sources of leverage. crude oil to China. Yet one of Tehran’s most strategically important export routes, the Tabriz–Ankara gas corridor, has Iran as a “major” supplier and expressed hope that supplies would continue for “years and decades to come. ” Despite the snapback, Ankara is still taking a critical renegotiation. Between late 2025 and mid-2026, Ankara will revisit most of its gas portfolio: long-term Russian contracts via Blue Stream and TurkStream, and the 9.6 billion cubic meters-per-year Iranian line, all come up for renewal or restructuring. In parallel, Turkey is signing, anchored by massive new long-term agreements with Exxon Mobil and Shell. These deals signal Ankara’s structural pivot toward Western LNG; Iranian gas is no longer crucial to Turkey’s energy security. In this environment, Ankara effectively has four options toward Iran: full renewal of the existing baseload contract; a reduced, more flexible swing-supply role; a short transitional extension while new sources ramp up; or a clean break. For Tehran, preserving something close to the status quo, steady volumes, long tenor, and minimal transparency over revenue flows, is the priority. covered winter heating spikes in eastern Anatolia, expanded connector pipelines and storage capacity now allow Ankara to decouple. title: What a scientist who studies protein and healthy aging eats in a day
content: Stuart Phillips has published more than 400 studies and scientific review papers. His approach to protein? Don’t overdo it. By Anahad O’Connor, The Washington PostAs you get older, your body will invariably begin to shed muscle. This age-related decline in muscle mass starts at about age 30 and accelerates after you turn 60. It can cause a loss of strength, endurance and mobility. Severe muscle loss in older adults, known as sarcopenia, can lead to sickness, disability and death. But you can significantly slow or delay muscle loss as you age by eating enough protein and doing resistance training.That’s according to Stuart Phillips, a professor in the department of kinesiology at McMaster University in Canada and a leading expert on protein, muscle health and aging. Phillips, 59, has spent years studying how exercise and nutrition can mitigate sarcopenia and age-related muscle loss. He has published more than 400 studies and scientific review papers, and his work has been cited thousands of times. Phillips argues that eating the right amount of protein is a critical part of staying healthy as you age. But he also says that many health influencers recommend amounts of protein that are excessive, which has helped fuel a protein craze, and not beneficial. “Eating more and more protein isn’t necessarily better for you,” he said. “It’s not like there are endless streams of benefits associated with higher intakes of protein.” The National Academy of Medicine says the amount of...

title: Port of Los Angeles records bustling 2025 but expects trade to fall off next year
content: The Port of L.A. expects to close the year having moved more than 10 million containers for only the third time in its history. But it expects a 7% drop in 2026. The Port of Los Angeles expects it will move than 10 million container units for the second year in a row despite President Trump's tariffs — but that number is likely to drop off in 2026 as the fallout of the administration's trade war persists. This year's volume will reflect a decision by importers to get ahead of the tariffs before the duties took effect — with trade later slowing, according to the monthly report by the nation's largest container port. 'In a word, 2025 was a roller coaster,' port Executive Director Gene Seroka said during the webcast. In November, there was a 12% decrease in volume with about 782,000 TEUs, or 20-foot equivalent container units, processed by the port. The decrease was driven by an 11% fall in year-over-year import volume. 'Much of that difference is tied to last year's rush to build inventories and now with some warehouse levels still elevated, importers are pacing their orders a bit more carefully,' Seroka said. Still, by the end of November, the port had moved almost 9.5 million container units, 1% more than last year, leading to the expectation that volume will top 10 million for the year. The port moved 10.3 million container units last year and set a record in 2021 when it moved 10.7 million container units. However, exports — cargo shipments from the port — fell for the...

title: Seattle weather: Gusty wind, heavy rain, and mountain snow Tuesday night
content: Tuesday and Wednesday will bring rising rivers, gusty winds, and significant mountain snow to Washington state. Tuesday and Wednesday will bring rising rivers, gusty winds, and significant mountain snow to Washington state.The first half of Tuesday will be showery at times and mild. High temperatures will reach the mid 50s. A much stronger system arrives tonight.Here is a look at the threats over the next few days:The storm moving in will push strong wind gusts into western Washington. Southerly winds will start ramping up on Tuesday afternoon in the Puget Sound area and along the Washington Coast. It will become more widespread after sunset. Peak wind gusts will hit after 10:00 p.m. Tuesday to around 6:00 a.m. Wednesday morning. After that, winds will be breezy, but not damaging.Wind gusts of 45 to 50 mph are possible across the greater Seattle area late Tuesday night into Wednesday morning.Stronger gusts of up to 60 mph are forecast along the coast, Hood Canal, south of Seattle and north of Everett. The ground is very saturated, and it will be easier for trees to fall. Charge up your devices before bed and prepare for potential power outages.Rivers will continue to rise as more heavy rain hits the area today and tonight. Several rivers will hit flood stage and will crest Wednesday and Thursday at moderate to major flood stage. Eight rivers are currently under a flood warning. The Skagit River is the only one expected to crest at major flood stage over the coming days.The...

title: 7 Movies From the 2020s That'll Likely Be Classics 50 Years From Now
content: Andrew Scott standing on a train and looking empty in All of Us Strangers (2023) There is a tremendous risk in the following endeavor, since one can only guess what sort of movies might age well, and which ones might not, but here goes nothing. Picture yourself in 2075, if you think you'll be around then , or picture someone else around in 2075, looking back on movies from about 50 years earlier. If you can’t imagine there being a world that still exists in 2075... well, that’s just, like, your opinion, man. But no. Imagine that time, if human beings are still around and there remain ways to watch movies of old. Just as The Godfather, One Flew Over the Cuckoo’s Nest, and Jaws are all 50-ish years old and still amazing, here’s hoping the following movies will still hold up, and indeed be considered classics in about five decades. These are all acclaimed movies nowadays, and have things that will either age well, or don’t have too many things one can imagine aging poorly. 7 'The Father' Since it’s hard to imagine a movie exploring the deterioration of one’s mind being more effective than the exploration of it in The Father, it feels safe to assume this one will still pack a punch in however many decades from now. As a psychological drama, it’s exceptionally intense and maybe even too immersive, because you really are in the head of Anthony Hopkins’s character, having no idea who anyone really is, or what’s going on. There’s little certainty when things begin, and even less by...

title: Bears' injury report has updates on Rome Odunze, Luther Burden
content: The Chicago Bears didn’t practice Tuesday, but their estimated injury report included updates on wide receivers Rome Odunze and Luther Burden. CHICAGO, ILLINOIS – DECEMBER 14: Luther Burden III #10 of the Chicago Bears runs with the ball after a reception against the Cleveland Browns at Soldier Field on December 14, 2025 in Chicago, Illinois. The Chicago Bears didn’t practice Tuesday, but their estimated injury report included updates on wide receivers Rome Odunze and Luther Burden. Odunze, who has missed the Bears’ last two games with a foot injury, would not have practiced with the team Tuesday as he continues his recovery from that ailment.The second-year wide receiver missed the team’s first game against the Green Bay Packers, then was a last-second scratch from the lineup for Sunday’s win over the Cleveland Browns after he re-aggravated his foot injury during pregame warmups. Burden would have also missed the practice after he injured his ankle during the Sunday win over Cleveland. Burden has seen his usage go up during the second half of the season, and he was targeted a season-high seven times in the game Sunday, with six catches for 84 yards before exiting in the third quarter. If Odunze and Burden can’t play, D.J. Moore could once again be a big focal point of the offense, along with Olamide Zaccheaus and tight end Colston Loveland. title: Trio of Russian athletes barred from luge World Cup amid neutrality concerns
content: The International Luge Federation has withdrawn the eligibility of three Russian athletes who intended to compete in Lake Placid, New York, this weekend The International Luge Federation has withdrawn the eligibility of three Russian athletes who intended to compete in Lake Placid, New York, this weekendThe International Luge Federation has withdrawn the eligibility of three Russian athletes who intended to slide in Lake Placid, New York, this weekend in hopes of moving closer to qualifying for the Milan Cortina Olympics, the governing body announced Tuesday. The federation's executive board made the decision to remove Alexsandr Gorbatsevich, Sofiia Mazur and Kseniia Shamova from the list of eligible sliders after “new evidence” was presented and discussed with, among others, the International Olympic Committee. FIL officials did not reveal the nature of the evidence, but a person familiar with the situation said it called into question the neutrality of Gorbatsevich, Mazur and Shamova regarding Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because that detail was not released publicly.in the process of determining which Russian athletes will be allowed to even have a chance of qualifying for the Olympics. title: Measles outbreaks worsen in South Carolina, Arizona and Utah
content: Nationally, the measles case count is nearing 2,000 for a disease that has been considered eliminated in the U.S. since 2000, a result of routine childhood vaccinations. Measles outbreaks are growing along the Utah - Arizona border and in South Carolina , where hundreds are in quarantine.Between Friday and Tuesday, South Carolina health officials confirmed 27 new measles cases in an outbreak in and around northwestern Spartanburg County. In two months, 111 people have been sickened by the vaccine-preventable virus.More than 250 people, including students from nine area elementary, middle and high schools, are in quarantine — some for the second time since the outbreak began in October. Most of the state's new cases stemmed from exposures at Way of Truth Church in Inman. Church leaders have been 'very helpful,' said state epidemiologist Dr. Linda Bell.'We are faced with ongoing transmission that we anticipate will go on for many more weeks, at least in our state,' Bell said.In Arizona and Utah, an outbreak has ballooned since August. Mohave County, Arizona has logged 172 cases and the Southwest Utah Public Health Department has logged 82 cases. The border cities of Colorado City, Arizona, and Hildale, Utah, are the heaviest hit.Overall, Utah has confirmed 115 measles cases this year. Arizona has confirmed 176.Nationally, the measles case count is nearing 2,000 for a disease that has been considered eliminated in the U.S. since 2000, a result of routine childhood...

title: Animals dying on streets
content: The most important stories for you to know today More animals are being run over on Los Angeles streets than ever before, and the lingering effects of the pandemic may be partly to blame.Through November of this year, the city’s MyLA311 service has fielded 31,093 requests for “dead animal removal,” an increase of more than a thousand from the same time last year. It marks a 37% increase from five years prior and is the fifth straight year of increases.While one of the drivers of the increase is the continual loss of habitat from urban development, Fraser Shiiling of the Road Ecology at the University of California, Davis says the after effects of the COVID-19 pandemic also are playing a role. The protracted lockdown sparked a boom in pet adoptions, which he says has now transformed into an increase in animals being let go by their owners.More animals are being run over on Los Angeles streets than ever before, and the lingering effects of the pandemic may be partly to blame. service has fielded 31,093 requests for “dead animal removal,” an increase of more than a thousand from the same time last year. content: Here’s where every DFW school sits after release of new UIL classification cutoff numbers Arlington Bowie head football coach Joseph Sam visits with Coppell head coach Antonio Wiley following the UIL’s new district alignments unveiling at Birdville Fine Arts Complex in North Richland Hills, Texas, February 1, 2024. Dallas-area high school coaches and athletic directors gathered to see the live, 9 a.m. announcement. Football coaches then huddled to sort out schedules amidst the two year settlement. Schools with an enrollment of 2,215 and higher will compete in 6A starting next school year, a drop of 60 students from the cutoff of 2,275 that was used for the current alignment. Class 5A Division I will be for schools with enrollments of 1,830 to 2,214, while 5A Division II will include schools with enrollments of 1,305 to 1,829.Schools may elect to move up or stay in a higher classification than where their current enrollment would place them. A Georgia woman is on a long road to recovering after 50% of her body was burned in an 'unprovoked acid attack' as police continue to search for her attacker. According to the FBI Atlanta Field Office and the Savannah Police Department , Ashley Wasielewski, 46, was returning to her home near Forsyth Park, a 30-acre park in the historic district, when a man approached her from behind and poured acid on her. The incident happened around 8:15 p.m. on Dec. 10. Police are seeking an unknown male who was wearing dark clothing. GEORGIA WOMAN HOSPITALIZED AFTER ATTACKER HURLS CORROSIZE CHEMICALS DURING EVENING WALK According to the SPD, when they arrived on the scene, Wasielewski’s clothes were melted and so were her car keys. Witnesses say her screams were terrifying. 'We don’t know who did it,' her son, Westley Wasielewski, told The Associated Press. 'She doesn’t have any enemies. She is a friend to everyone.' According to a verified GoFundMe organized for Wasielewski, the attack left the mother with severe burns 'covering over 50% of her body.' She was transported to the Augusta Burn Center for treatment. title: Gov. Ferguson amends WA emergency declaration
content: Governor Bob Ferguson has announced he will amend the state's emergency declaration, and that his office has identified millions of dollars to fast track to flooded communities. Washington Governor Bob Ferguson has announced he will amend the emergency declaration for the state that the Trump administration approved last week amid developments in damage and response needs.With millions of dollars on the line, and entire communities underwater in parts of Washington following back-to-back atmospheric rivers, the governor says he has identified much needed funds and made changes to the original declaration. "We've currently identified $3.5 million that I can move without legislative action for short-term relief. We're working to activate as many state resources as we can. We will provide more information to the public as soon as we have it," said Gov. Ferguson on Tuesday, Dec. 16. Within the amendments are changes to descriptions of specific impacts to the 14 listed counties in the original declaration. As standing water continues to erode earth, weaken roads, cause levee breaks, and increase chances for landslides, another atmospheric river is rolling into Washington. High wind warnings are in effect from 4 p.m. Tuesday until 6 a.m. Wednesday. The high winds, combined with soaked grounds, has the potential to cause fallen trees, power outages and more impacts. title: "Пари Сен-Жермен" — "Фламенго". Прогноз и варианты ставок на финал Межконтинентального кубка ФИФА 17 декабря
content: В понедельник в Дохе вингер "ПСЖ" Усман Дембеле получил приз лучшему футболисту года от ФИФА. Церемонию устраивали, не отходя от кассы, и накануне решающего матча Межконтинентального кубка ФИФА, в котором парижане сыграют с бразильским "Фламенго". "ПСЖ", выиграв Лигу чемпионов, получил прямую путевку в решающий матч. Бразильцы же только в конце ноября завоевали Кубок Либертадорес, а затем почти сразу отправились в Катар, где прошли уже два раунда плей-офф, чтобы попасть в финал. Сначала они обыграли мексиканский "Крус Асуль", а затем — и египетский "Пирамидс". Все эти игры состоялись уже в Катаре. И теперь финал. Для "ПСЖ" это будет предпоследний матч в 2025 году, но для основного состава наверняка последний, ведь останется сыграть лишь с полулюбительским "Фонтене" в 1/32 финала Кубка Франции 20 декабря. Так что для чемпиона Франции остался последний рывок и можно отдохнуть. При этом график сложный у обеих команд, но у французов он слегка попроще. В декабре они сыграли пока лишь три матча: разгромили в чемпионате "Ренн" (5:0), сыграли вничью с "Атлетиком" в Лиге чемпионов (0:0), а также не без труда переиграли "Мец" в Лиге 1 (3:2). А вот "Фламенго" сыграл уже четыре встречи, и это с учетом сложной дороги. Еще 30 ноября был финал Кубка Либертадорес в Перу против соотечественников из "Палмейраса" (1:0), затем победа в серии "А" над "Сеарой" (1:0), ничья в гостях у "Мирассола" (3:3), дорога до Катара, упомянутые победы над "Крус Асуль" и "Пирамидс". У "Фламенго"...

title: Mulleria: ಮನೆಯೊಳಗೆ ನೇಣು ಬಿಗಿದು ಸಾವಿಗೀಡಾದ ಸ್ಥಿತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಶಾಲಾ ವಿದ್ಯಾರ್ಥಿಯ ಶವ ಪತ್ತೆ
content: ಮುಳ್ಳೇರಿಯ: ಬೆಳ್ಳೂರು ಸರಕಾರಿ ಹೈಯರ್‌ ಸೆಕೆಂಡರಿ ಶಾಲೆಯ 9 ನೇ ತರಗತಿ ವಿದ್ಯಾರ್ಥಿ ಪ್ರಜ್ವಲ್‌(14) ಮನೆಯ ಬೆಡ್‌ರೂಂನಲ್ಲಿ ನೇಣು ಬಿಗಿದು ಸಾವಿಗೀಡಾದ ಸ್ಥಿತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಗಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಈತ ಬೆಳ್ಳೂರುನೆಟ್ಟಣಿಗೆ ಕುಂಜತ್ತೋಡಿ ನಿವಾಸಿ ಜಯಕರ - ಅನಿತಾ ದಂಪತಿಯ ಪುತ್ರ. ಡಿ.15 ರಂದು ಅಪರಾಹ್ನ 2.30 ರಿಂದ 4.30ರ ಮಧ್ಯೆ ಘಟನೆ ನಡೆದಿದೆ. ತಾಯಿ ಅನಿತಾ ಮುಳ್ಳೇರಿಯ ಶಾಲೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಕಲಿಯುತ್ತಿರುವ ಪುತ್ರಿಯನ್ನುಕರೆದುಕೊಂಡು ಬರಲು ತೆರಳಿದ್ದರು. ಅವರು ಮರಳಿ ಮನೆಗೆ ತಲುಪಿದಾಗ ಪ್ರಜ್ವಲ್‌ ಬೆಡ್‌ ರೂಂನಲ್ಲಿಶಾಲು ಬಳಸಿ ನೇಣು ಬಿಗಿದ ಸ್ಥಿತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಗಿದ್ದು, ಕೂಡಲೇಸ್ಥಳೀಯರು ಸೇರಿ ಮುಳ್ಳೇರಿಯದ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ಸಾಗಿಸಿದ್ದರೂ, ಅಷ್ಟರೊಳಗೆಸಾವು ಸಂಭವಿಸಿತ್ತು. ಆದಿತ್ಯವಾರ ಪ್ರಜ್ವಲ್‌ಅಜ್ಜಿ ಮನೆಗೆ ತೆರಳಿದ್ದು, ಅಲ್ಲಿಂದಸೋಮವಾರ ಶಾಲೆಗೆ ಪರೀಕ್ಷೆ ಬರೆಯಲು ತಲುಪಿದ್ದರು. ಪರೀಕ್ಷೆ ಮಧ್ಯಾಹ್ನ ವೆಂದು ಭಾವಿಸಿ 11 ಗಂಟೆಗೆ ಶಾಲೆಗೆ ತಲುಪಿದ್ದು, ಆದರೆ ಪರೀಕ್ಷೆ ಬೆಳಗ್ಗೆನಡೆದಿತ್ತು. ತರಗತಿಗೆ ತಲುಪಲು ವಿಳಂಬವಾಗಿದ್ದರೂ ಪ್ರಜ್ವಲ್‌ಗೆ ಪರೀಕ್ಷೆ ಬರೆಯಲು ಅನುಮತಿನೀಡಿರುವುದಾಗಿ ಶಾಲಾಧಿಕಾರಿಗಳು ಪೊಲೀಸರಲ್ಲಿ ತಿಳಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಓದಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಜ್ವಲ್‌ಮುಂದಿದ್ದನೆಂದು ಅಧ್ಯಾಪಕರು ತಿಳಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಆದರೆ ನೇಣು ಬಿಗಿದುಕೊಳ್ಳಲು ಕಾರಣ ತಿಳಿದುಬಂದಿಲ್ಲ. ಮೃತ ಪ್ರಜ್ವಲ್‌ ತಂದೆ, ತಾಯಿ, ಸಹೋದರಿಪ್ರಯಾಗ ಹಾಗು ಅಪಾರ ಬಂಧು ಮಿತ್ರರನ್ನು ಅಗಲಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಆದೂರು ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಪ್ರಕರಣದಾಖಲಿಸಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
creator: Team Udayavani

他跟爸爸住山邊貨櫃屋 從棒球運動找到自信
content: 中國信託慈善基金會表示,一名國中生阿嘉(化名)遲遲未繳學費,學校師長家訪時才發現,原來這孩子與父親住在鐵皮貨櫃屋裡,居住環境簡陋,破損牆面只能用單薄的木板遮擋風雨,冰箱裡也少有鮮食,生活相當刻苦。在台灣,仍有許多弱勢孩子面臨相同的生活困境,「點燃生命之火」呼籲社會大眾獻出愛心,幫助孩子扭轉未來。立即捐款→ https://www.ctbcfoundation.org/ 。 14 歲的阿嘉與爸爸兩人相依為命,家計僅靠爸爸在工地努力打零工賺錢。為了減少開銷,他們住在山邊破舊的貨櫃屋,幾處還漏著水,冬天時寒風吹得刺骨,夏天時,因為日曬一整天,鐵皮牆壁還會燙傷人。屋內僅有一張床和一張桌子,打開冰箱也是空蕩蕩的,父子倆經常煮一鍋熱水,三、四顆火鍋料加進去,如此簡單打發一餐。 學校師長後來鼓勵爸爸讓孩子加入「點燃生命之火」支持的偏鄉學校棒球隊, 透過計畫提供的餐食、課輔資源,減輕家裡負擔,且有師長陪伴,幫助阿嘉從棒球運動中找到自信,回到生活正軌 。孩子看到爸爸為了省錢幫他買一雙好走的鞋子跟手套,靠著吃成藥、貼藥布舒緩工作造成的傷口與疼痛,阿嘉一度自責想要離開球隊,跟著鄰居去當廚師賺錢,「爸爸這麼累,我想去打工賺錢,幫忙分擔家計...」所幸在師長與計畫持續支持下,孩子才能堅持到現在。 (相關報導: 第41屆點燃生命之火開跑 捐起來!辜仲諒承諾把關每一分善款 | 更多文章 ) 阿嘉是「點燃生命之火」扶助的孩童之一,現在您可以透過捐款,讓更多像他們一樣的弱勢孩子,在課後有志工陪伴、穩定餐食和多元課程學習的機會,邀你一起加入第41屆「點燃生命之火」,用愛守護每個孩子的夢想道路。更多訊息請上網搜尋「點燃生命之火」或上中國信託慈善基金會官網查詢。
creator: 陳怡慈

title: 天氣/記得帶傘!2波水氣接力襲台「雨彈開炸」,雨下多久、何時放晴一次看
content: 未來幾天天氣再度轉由東北季風掌控。根據 中央氣象署 最新預報, 今(12月17日)至18日東北季風持續影響,各地天氣呈現「早晚偏冷、降雨偏多」的型態 。北部與宜蘭低溫落在13至17度,南部與花東也僅18至19度,寒意明顯,且水氣同步增多,使北台灣降雨風險上升。 氣象署預報員鄭傑仁指出,今天和明天週四氣溫變化幅度不大, 但因東北季風影響,新竹以南日夜溫差較為明顯。 白天高溫方面,北部與東半部約21至24度,中南部與台東可達25至28度;然而夜間與清晨氣溫明顯下探,中北部與宜蘭僅13至17度,南部與花東也降至18至19度, 體感偏冷 。 降雨是這波天氣的另一個關鍵。鄭傑仁說明, 隨著中低層水氣增加,週三、週四桃園以北與東半部整天都有不定時降雨,其中「基隆北海岸、大台北山區與宜蘭」需提高警覺,局部地區有出現大雨的可能。 這樣的天氣型態,使北台灣通勤與戶外活動受影響程度明顯增加。 進入週五、週六(12月19日至20日),東北季風雖略為減弱,氣溫短暫回升,但天氣並未轉穩。 各地清晨低溫約15至20度,北部與宜蘭白天高溫回到22至24度,中南部與台東約23至25度。然而,隨著南方雲系北移, 水氣進一步增加 ,全台幾乎都有降雨機會 ,北台灣仍持續濕冷,南部與東南部也轉為局部短暫陣雨。 根據氣象署評估,全台有雨的情況預計持續至週六晚間。 到了週日(12月21日),東北季風轉為較乾的型態 ,新竹以南降雨將逐漸減少,天氣明顯趨緩;不過桃園以北與東半部仍有局部短暫雨勢。 氣溫方面,週日到下週一(12月22日)東北季風再度增強,各地再度轉涼 ,低溫約14至20度,北部與東半部白天高溫降至19至26度,中南部與台東仍可維持24至28度。 (相關報導: 天氣最新》16日短暫回暖只是過場!冷氣團、東北季風接力 這2天「高山有望見雪」 | 更多文章 ) 在氣溫與水氣條件配合下,氣象署提醒,週五中部以北與宜花地區、海拔3500公尺以上高山,有出現零星降雪或道路結冰的機率。整體來看,這波天氣屬於「濕冷型東北季風」,影響時間長、區域廣,民眾除留意低溫,也應注意連日降雨對交通、山區與高山活動的影響。
creator: 周育信

title: Rafale Fighter Jets Go ‘Made In India’: Kochi-Based Company Wins Contract from France
content: New Delhi: India has taken a step ahead in indigenising the Rafale fighter jet under its Make-in-India initiative. French aerospace and defence company Thales has awarded a contract to Indian firm SFO Technologies to manufacture a critical part of the Rafale’s Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA) radar system. This component, which is key to the radar’s performance, will now be produced domestically, signalling the beginning of a broader effort to increase India’s self-reliance in advanced defence technology. On Monday (December 15), Thales announced that this technically complex wired structure, a component of the RBE2 AESA radar, will now be produced in India. The contract has been awarded to SFO Technologies. Add Zee News as a Preferred Source Rafale Radar Components To Be Made In India SFO Technologies operates facilities in Kochi, Thiruvananthapuram, Bengaluru and Mysuru, as well as one site in the United States. According to Thales, “These components are designed to withstand challenging environmental conditions and form an essential part of the RBE2 AESA radar, which is a core mission system of the Rafale fighter jet.” Following The New Order Of 26 Rafales This development comes soon after India placed an order for 26 Rafale jets for the Navy. Thales said, “This step follows the Indian Navy’s recent order of 26 Rafale aircraft. As a partner of the Dassault Aviation Rafale industrial team, Thales is working on a local roadmap that involves close collaboration...

title: "목표가 2배 가까이 상향"... 증권가 기대감 높인 종목은
content: ◆...(사진=프리픽 제공) 올해 실적 부진을 겪고 있는 아이에스동서에 대해 신영증권이 목표주가를 기존 2만6000원에서 5만원으로 상향 조정했다. 투자의견은 '매수'를 유지하며 내년부터 본격적인 실적 회복이 가능하다는 전망을 내놨다. 17일 신영증권은 아이에스동서의 올해 매출과 영업이익이 각각 1조680억원과 970억원으로 전년 대비 29.5%, 42.8% 감소할 것으로 추정했다. 박세라 연구원은 "건설경기 침체 이후 극단적인 수주 제한이 매출 공백과 비용 증가를 초래해 실적이 위축됐다"고 분석했다. 박 연구원은 올해 4분기 예상되는 영업권 손상 등 일회성 비용 반영이 마무리되면 실적 하락세가 멈출 것으로 내다봤다. 그러나 "내년부터는 본격적인 실적 턴어라운드가 시작되며 기업가치가 재평가되는 국면에 진입할 것"이라고 밝혔다. 또한 아이에스동서는 11월 '울산호수공원 에일린의 뜰' 분양을 성공적으로 시작하며 주택사업 부문에서 회복 신호를 보이고 있다. 해당 단지는 최고경쟁률 46.5대1을 기록하며 흥행에 성공했다. 박 연구원은 "이 분양을 기점으로 본격적인 집중 분양 시기에 돌입해 실적 반등을 꾀하고 있다"며 "사업 전반이 바닥을 통과해 회복세로 접어들고 있다"고 덧붙였다. 한편, 아이에스동서가 매각을 추진하던 폐기물 소각업체 코엔텍은 지난 16일 매각 대상자를 선정하고 주식매매계약을 체결했다. 신영증권은 해당 지분 매각을 통해 추가적인 이익이 발생할 가능성이 높다고 전망했다....
creator: 조세일보 / 김혜인 기자 phoenix@joseilbo.com

title: Rekordhaushalt: Debatte über Haushalt – Generalabrechnung im NRW-Landtag
content: NRW plant Rekordausgaben für 2026 – im Landtag dürften es bei der Haushaltsdebatte hoch hergehen. Auch Ministerpräsident Wüst wird das Wort ergreifen.Der nordrhein-westfälische Landtag will am Mittwoch (ab 10.00 Uhr) den Rekordhaushalt für 2026 verabschieden. Die Opposition nutzt die dritte und abschließende Haushaltslesung im Plenum traditionell für eine Generalabrechnung mit der Regierung. Auch Ministerpräsident Hendrik Wüst (CDU) wird das Wort ergreifen.Die NRW-Regierung plant für 2026 Ausgaben in Höhe von 112,3 Milliarden Euro ein. Das sind 6,8 Milliarden Euro mehr als im Haushalt des laufenden Jahres. Über 43,5 Milliarden Euro sind 2026 für Kinder, Schulen, Hochschulen und Kitas vorgesehen. Ein Drittel aller Ausgaben des Landeshaushalts entfällt auch 2026 auf die Kommunen. SPD für höhere SchuldenaufnahmeRund 4,3 Milliarden Euro will die schwarz-grüne Landesregierung 2026 an Schulden auf dem Kreditmarkt aufnehmen – das sind 200 Millionen weniger als zunächst geplant. Die SPD-Opposition kritisiert, dass die Landesregierung ihren Kreditrahmen nicht ausschöpfe. Für den Haushalt 2026 hätte das Land rund eine Milliarde Euro mehr an Krediten aufnehmen können. Die SPD fordert ein rund fünf Milliarden Euro schweres Sonderprogramm für Kinder, Kommunen und Sicherheit in NRW. Davon sollten mit mehr als 700 Millionen Euro die Geldbeutel von Familien entlastet werden, etwa durch die Abschaffung der Eigenanteile für Schulbücher, den Einstieg in die...

title: Investitionen und Schulden: Niedersachsens Landtag berät weiter über Haushalt 2026
content: Im Landtag wird über die Pläne der rot-grünen Landesregierung für 2026 diskutiert. Um welche Themen es dabei geht.Niedersachsens Landtag beschäftigt sich am Mittwoch (ab 9.00 Uhr) weiter mit dem Landeshaushalt für das kommende Jahr. Die Abgeordneten diskutieren unter anderem die Pläne für die Bereiche Wirtschaft, Verkehr, Energie und Klimaschutz.Der Etat soll von 45,6 Milliarden Euro im laufenden Jahr auf 48,2 Milliarden Euro steigen. Der größte Teil davon – rund 11,8 Milliarden Euro – ist für Bildung und Wissenschaft vorgesehen. Allerdings wächst auch der Schuldenberg.Finanzminister Gerald Heere sprach am Dienstag von einer haushaltspolitischen "Zeitenwende": Mit der Lockerung der Schuldenbremse habe Rot-Grün ein "Investitionsprogramm historischer Dimension" von fast 14,5 Milliarden Euro auf den Weg gebracht. Die Opposition wirft SPD und Grünen indes eine halbherzige Regierungsführung vor. "Sie gehen in Trippelschritten voran und machen nur halbe Sachen", sagte CDU-Fraktionschef Sebastian Lechner.

title: Parlament: Landtag berät über Rettungsdienst, Rundfunk und Wehrpflicht
content: Telenotarzt und Gemeindenotfallsanitäter könnten bald Alltag werden in Sachsen-Anhalt. Was sonst noch auf der Tagesordnung des Parlaments in Magdeburg steht.Der Landtag von Sachsen-Anhalt berät am Mittwoch über eine Änderung des Rettungsdienstgesetzes. Die bisherigen Pilotprojekte Telenotarzt und Gemeindenotfallsanitäter sollen fest im Rettungsdienst verankert werden. Außerdem debattieren die Abgeordneten über die Zukunft des öffentlich-rechtlichen Rundfunks und die Wehrpflicht. Die Sitzung beginnt um 9.30 Uhr.

title: Kreuzfahrtbranche: "Amadea" beendet Kreuzfahrtsaison in Warnemünde
content: Im Ostseebad Warnemünde sind in dieser Saison mehr als eine halbe Million Kreuzfahrtgäste an und von Bord gegangen. Noch ein Schiff legt an - dann ist Winterpause.Das Kreuzfahrtschiff "Amadea" der Reederei Phönix Reisen beendet am Mittwoch die Kreuzfahrtsaison in Warnmünde. Das durch die ZDF-Sendung "Das Traumschiff" bekannte 193 Meter lange Schiff bietet Platz für 570 Passagiere und kommt aus Malmö und wird gegen 9.00 Uhr anlegen. Nach einer Übernachtung geht es weiter nach Wismar. In der gesamten Saison 2025 wurden nach Angaben von Rostock Port im Kreuzfahrthafen Warnemünde 165 Schiffsanläufe von 35 Kreuzfahrtschiffen mit 592.000 Passagieren registriert. Die Passagierschiffe bezogen bei 75 Anläufen umweltfreundlichen Landstrom von insgesamt 2,2 Millionen Kilowattstunden. An 126 von 365 Tagen des Jahres legten Kreuzfahrtschiffe im Warnemünder Hafen an.Eröffnet wird die neue Saison 2026 mit dem Anlauf der "AIDAdiva" am 29. März. Für das kommende Jahr wurden nach Angaben von Rostock Port bisher 163 Anläufe von 35 Kreuzfahrtschiffen von 20 nationalen und internationalen Kreuzfahrtreedereien angemeldet.

title: Verfassungsgericht: Neuartiges Auszählen bei Kommunalwahlen landet vor Gericht
content: Bald können Hessinnen und Hessen wieder ihre kommunalen Parlamente bestimmen. Die Sitzverteilung will Schwarz-Rot jedoch anders berechnen lassen. Damit befasst sich Hessens höchstes Gericht. Warum?Wahlberechtigte in Hessen können am 15. März wieder ihre Gemeinde- und Kreisparlamente wählen. Dabei will die schwarz-rote Landesregierung die Sitzverteilung neuartig berechnen. So möchte sie einer Zersplitterung vorbeugen und Ein-Personen-Fraktionen verhindern. Laut Experten werden größere Parteien etwas begünstigt. Dagegen klagt die oppositionelle FDP-Landtagsfraktion. An diesem Mittwoch (11.00 Uhr) befasst sich damit der Staatsgerichtshof in Wiesbaden in mündlicher Verhandlung. Ein Urteil zum sogenannten Normenkontrollantrag der FDP (P. St. 3013) wird erst Wochen später erwartet. Hessens höchstes Gericht soll klären, welches Auszählverfahren bei den Kommunalwahlen für die Vertretungen in 21 Kreistagen sowie in mehr als 420 Städten und Gemeinden in Hessen gilt.Die FDP wertet die Wahlrechtsreform als Angriff auf "die demokratische Vielfalt in den hessischen Kommunalparlamenten". Nach ihren Berechnungen hätten CDU und SPD bei den bislang letzten Kommunalwahlen 2021 in Hessen 94 beziehungsweise 68 mehr Mandate bekommen, wäre damals schon das neue Berechnungsverfahren angewandt worden. Insgesamt hätten sich 272 Mandate verschoben. Hessens Landesregierung verweist dagegen gern auf das Beispiel Frankfurt: Dort sitzen gegenwärtig gleich 16 Gruppierungen im...

title: Neuartiges Auszählen bei Kommunalwahlen landet vor Gericht
Presidenta del CNE denuncian bloqueos, secuestros y avasallamiento institucional
content: La consejera presidenta del Consejo Nacional Electoral (CNE), Ana Paola Hall, denunció a través de su cuenta de X que miembros de las Juntas Especiales, propuestos por partidos políticos y no empleados del CNE, habrían impedido el ingreso de funcionarios al Centro Logístico Electoral (CLE).Según Hall, los integrantes de estas juntas ingresaron previamente al Infop con el objetivo de realizar escrutinios públicos, pero este martes restringieron el acceso de personal del CNE. “Exigiéndoles que se identifiquen y diciéndoles que ellos (los empleados del CNE) se deben a los Partidos e imponiéndose por estar en notable ventaja numérica”, escribió.La consejera calificó la situación como un atentado contra la institucionalidad: “¿Habrá una mejor descripción de un secuestro a la institucionalidad? A la vista y paciencia de todos y todas, nosotras nos encontramos disminuidas en nuestra libertad, nuestros funcionarios no pueden ingresar a realizar sus funciones”, denunció.En vivo: Así puedes ver en directo el escrutinio especial del CNEIncumplimiento de laboresHall también señaló que el personal enviado por los partidos políticos para realizar el escrutinio especial se negó a cumplir con su labor, lo que, según ella, representa un avasallamiento al CNE.En su mensaje cuestionó la falta de acción de las autoridades responsables de garantizar el orden público y la seguridad del proceso electoral: “¿Dónde está la investigación que corresponde? ¿Por qué las...
creator: Luis Ardón

title: More Europeans favor stronger China ties in tech: report
content: MADRID, Dec. 16 (Xinhua) -- Public support for closer ties between Europe and China has risen sharply, while calls are growing for a tougher European stance toward the United States and U.S. Big Tech firms, according to a recent report published on Tuesday. The European Tech Insights 2025 survey, conducted by IE University's Center for the Governance of Change in Spain, found that 29 percent of Europeans now prefer Europe to side with China, up from 14 percent in 2023. At the same time, a significant share of respondents believe Europe should adopt a firmer position toward the United States, especially in defending its strategic and technological interests. The report showed strong support for closer ties with China in Southern Europe. In Spain, 52.8 percent of respondents said Europe should side with China - the highest share among the ten countries surveyed. Italy followed with 35 percent and France with 31.3 percent. Support in these countries has also risen significantly compared with 2023. However, the report suggests that this shift does not signal a straightforward geopolitical pivot. A majority of respondents believe the continent should avoid confrontation and instead pursue a more balanced or autonomous position in its foreign relations. Country-level data show that while preferences for closer ties with the United States remain dominant in much of northern and Eastern Europe, support has weakened considerably. In Germany, 72 percent of respondents favored closer...

title: Trump administration expands list of countries subject to entry restrictions
content: WASHINGTON, Dec. 16 (Xinhua) -- U.S. President Donald Trump on Tuesday signed a proclamation expanding the list of countries subject to full or partial entry restrictions to cover around 40 countries, effective on Jan. 1, 2026. Trump "signed a Proclamation expanding and strengthening entry restrictions on nationals from countries with demonstrated, persistent, and severe deficiencies in screening, vetting, and information-sharing to protect the Nation from national security and public safety threats," the White House said in a fact sheet. In June, the White House fully restricted and limited the entry of citizens from 12 countries "found to be deficient with regards to screening and vetting and determined to pose a very high risk to the United States." These are Afghanistan, Myanmar, Chad, the Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Haiti, Iran, Libya, Somalia, Sudan and Yemen. The U.S. administration also partially restricted and limited the entry of nationals from seven countries "who also pose a high level of risk to the United States": Burundi, Cuba, Laos, Sierra Leone, Togo, Turkmenistan and Venezuela. The newly signed proclamation adds full restrictions and entry limitations on five additional countries based on recent analysis: Burkina Faso, Mali, Niger, South Sudan, and Syria. It also adds full restrictions and entry limitations on individuals holding Palestinian Authority-issued travel documents. The administration also imposed full restrictions and entry...

title: Wie ist es um die Kinder- und Jugendhilfe bestellt?
Illegale Flugobjekte: Drohnenabwehr: Innenminister stellt neue Waffe vor
content: 47 Drohnenflüge über kritischer Infrastruktur sind in den ersten zehn Monaten 2025 in Rheinland-Pfalz registriert worden. Seit März darf die Polizei mit technischen Mitteln dagegen vorgehen. Aber wie?Illegale Drohnen über Gesundheitseinrichtungen, Verkehr oder Industrieanlagen: Die Polizei kann in solchen Fällen bei der Abwehr aktiv werden. Der rheinland-pfälzische Innenminister Michael Ebling (SPD) stellt heute (12.30 Uhr) dafür eine neue Mitteldistanzwaffe vor. Gezeigt werden sollen auf dem Schießplatz der Polizei in Ingelheim auch, wie unerlaubte Drohnen überhaupt festgestellt und verifiziert werden können und wie die Polizei darauf reagieren kann. 47 Drohnenflüge über kritische Infrastrukturen in Rheinland-Pfalz sind in den ersten zehn Monaten des Jahres von der Polizei registriert worden. In zehn dieser Fälle sei ein verantwortlicher Drohnenfernpilot festgestellt worden. Eine der illegal fliegenden Drohnen sei abgewehrt worden. Die Polizei ist seit dem 1. März 2025 gesetzlich ermächtigt, "geeignete technische Mittel zur Abwehr von Gefahren, die von unbemannten Luftfahrtsystemen ausgehen, einzusetzen".

title: 에이티즈 종호, 솔로곡 '우리의 마음이 닿는 곳이라면' 영상 공개...'겨울 감성' 절정
content: [마이데일리 = 강다윤 기자] 그룹 에이티즈(ATEEZ) 종호가 솔로곡으로 겨울 감성을 한층 더 짙게 물들였다. 종호는 17일 0시 에이티즈 공식 유튜브 채널을 통해 솔로곡 '우리의 마음이 닿는 곳이라면 (To be your light)' 영상을 공개했다. 공개된 영상은 아날로그적인 따뜻한 색감 속 종호의 모습이 나타나 시선을 이끌었다. 감각적인 선율 위로 종호 특유의 감미로운 보컬이 어우러지며 드라마틱한 분위기를 연출한 가운데, 친구들과의 추억을 상기시키는 종호의 감정 연기가 극강의 몰입감을 선사했다. 귀와 눈을 동시에 사로잡은 종호의 '우리의 마음이 닿는 곳이라면'은 곡명부터 가사까지 전체가 한국어로 이뤄져 리스너들의 감수성을 더욱 자극했다. 그뿐만 아니라 깊은 여운까지 안기며 오랫동안 팬들의 마음에 잔잔한 울림으로 자리 잡았다. '우리의 마음이 닿는 곳이라면'은 에이티즈 미니 12집 '골든 아워 : 파트 3 '인 유어 판타지 에디션'(GOLDEN HOUR : Part.3 'In Your Fantasy Edition')'에 수록된 종호의 솔로곡이다. 꿈을 향해 차근차근 내 마음이 닿는 곳으로 나아간다면 언젠가 그 꿈은 이루어질 것이라는 메시지가 담겨 있다. 강다윤 기자 k_yo_on@mydaily.co.kr - c마이데일리( www.mydaily.co.kr ). 무단전재&재배포 금지 -
creator: 강다윤 기자

title: 이디야커피, 음료 평균 용량 28% 늘리고 메뉴 강화
content: [마이데일리 = 방금숙 기자] 이디야커피가 음료 용량을 확대하고 메뉴 라인업을 강화한다. 이디야커피는 16일부터 음료 용량 확대와 메뉴 라인업 개편을 전국 매장에 본격 적용한다고 밝혔다. 이번 개편의 핵심은 음료 사이즈 체계를 라지(L)와 엑스트라(EX)로 통일한 것이다. 그동안 메뉴군별로 달랐던 용량 기준을 일원화해 고객 선택의 편의성을 높이고, 매장 제조 과정의 일관성도 강화했다. 이에 따라 기존 14온스(oz)로 제공되던 모든 음료의 기본 용량은 18온스로 확대됐다. 단일 사이즈로 운영되던 플랫치노와 쉐이크 메뉴에도 엑스트라(EX) 사이즈를 새롭게 도입했다. 이에 따라 음료 평균 제공 용량은 약 28.6% 늘어났다. 메뉴 구성도 강화됐다. 재출시·시즌·상시 메뉴를 포함해 약 20여 종의 음료 라인업을 재정비하고 신제품을 추가해 선택 폭을 넓혔다. 가맹점 운영 측면에서는 레시피 표준화와 원부자재 통합을 통해 제조 공정과 재고·교육 관리 효율성을 강화했다. 개편을 맞아 고객 참여형 ‘최애 메뉴’ 이벤트를 진행한다. 오는 29일까지 고객은 신상, 재출시, 상시 시즌 등 3개 카테고리 중 가장 기대하는 메뉴를 선택해 응모할 수 있다. 추첨을 통해 이디야카드 15만원권과 멤버십 음료 할인권 등을 제공한다. 이디야커피 관계자는 “이번 음료 용량 확대와 라인업 확대 적용은 고객의 이용 패턴을 반영해 음료 구성의 편의성과 선택 폭을 넓히기 위한 것”이라며 “고객의 선호를 직접 확인하고 더 나은 경험을 제공하기 위해 참여형...
creator: 방금숙 기자

title: 故 이순재 "신세 많이 졌습니다"...KBS 연기대상 2차 티저 공개
content: [마이데일리 = 박로사 기자] ‘2025 KBS 연기대상’이 2차 티저를 공개하며, 한 해를 빛낸 작품과 수상의 주인공을 향한 기대감을 한층 끌어올렸다. 오는 31일(수) 생방송되는 ‘2025 KBS 연기대상’은 미니시리즈, 주말드라마, 일일드라마, 단막 프로젝트까지 올 한 해 동안 시청자와 만난 KBS 드라마를 총망라해, 배우들의 열연과 작품의 순간들을 다시 한번 조명하는 자리다. 장성규, 남지현, 문상민이 MC로 확정된 가운데, ‘2025 KBS 연기대상’은 한 해의 드라마 여정을 마무리하는 공식적인 축제의 장으로 주목받고 있다. 앞서 공개된 1차 티저에는 한 해 동안 안방극장을 채운 명장면들이 펼쳐지며 연말을 장식할 드라마 축제의 시작을 알렸다. 17일(오늘) 공개된 2차 티저에는 1987년 KBS 탤런트 연기대상부터 2024 KBS 연기대상까지, 역대 수상자들의 진심 어린 수상 소감이 담겼다. 나문희, 채시라, 이덕화, 지현우, 김혜자, 고두심, 최수종, 김혜수, 김지원, 변우석, 박보검 등 시대를 대표하는 배우들의 소감이 이어지며 KBS 드라마가 남긴 감동의 순간들을 다시금 상기시킨다. 특히 지난해 ‘2024 KBS 연기대상’에서 대상의 영예를 안았던 고(故) 이순재의 수상 소감은 깊은 울림을 전한다. 연기에 대한 평생의 철학과 후배들을 향한 따뜻한 메시지는, 시간을 넘어 여전히 많은 이들의 마음에 오래 남는 순간으로 회자되고 있다. 또한 역대 수상자들과 함께 등장한 ‘그 시절 무대가 빛바래도, 모두가 함께 만든 순간들. 변하지 않는 진심이 남아...
creator: 박로사 기자

title: Lee Min Kyu's revival. "Thank you. Volleyball with the director is fun."
content: [마이데일리 = 이정원 기자] "It's fun to play volleyball with the coach." OK Savings Bank setter Lee Min-kyu succeeded in reviving this season. Lee Min-kyu, who left a regret after failing to perform well in recent years, returned to the Lee Min-kyu we knew after meeting with Lee Min-kyu and Shin Young-chul, a coach from Specifier. He has started all 14 games this season, recording an average of 10.984 sets per set. It is the first time since the 2017-2018 season (10.302 sets) that Lee Min-kyu recorded more than 10 sets on average per set. In the meantime, injuries and sluggishness have hampered Lee. Along with Lee Min-kyu, who is playing healthy, OK Savings Bank is also looking for a rebound. OK Savings Bank, which was humiliating the lowest in the last season, is ranked fifth with 21 points (7 wins and 7 losses) along with Shin Young-chul's appointment and veteran Jeon Kwang-in's joining. It is one point away from KEPCO (22 points and 8 wins and 6 losses), which is ranked third. It was Lee Min-kyu, who led the team to a 3-0 complete victory at home in Busan on the 12th. It stopped Korean Air from winning 11 consecutive games. Lee Min-kyu, whom I met after the game, said, "For sure, Korean Air is strong. It is a team that has been playing undefeated games for more than a month. But we got three points," he said with a smile. Dimitar Dimitrov (registered name Dimitrov) is slowly melting into the V-League. Coach Shin Young-chul is also satisfied with his recent performance...
creator: 이정원 기자

title: 르세라핌, 글로벌 반응 진짜 뜨겁다...빌보드 글로벌 차트 7주 연속 진입
content: [마이데일리 = 이승길 기자] 그룹 르세라핌(LE SSERAFIM)의 ‘SPAGHETTI (feat. j-hope of BTS)’가 빌보드 글로벌 송차트에서 뜨거운 인기를 이어가고 있다. 이번주 K-팝 그룹곡 중 최고 순위를 기록하며 ‘4세대 걸그룹 최강자’다운 면모를 과시했다. 16일 미국 음악 전문 매체 빌보드가 발표한 최신 차트(12월 20일 자)에 따르면 르세라핌(김채원, 사쿠라, 허윤진, 카즈하, 홍은채)의 싱글 1집 타이틀곡이 ‘글로벌 200’과 ‘글로벌 (미국 제외)’에서 각각 52위, 31위에 올랐다. 금주 두 개 차트에서 모두 K-팝 그룹곡 중 가장 높은 순위를 차지했다. 200개 이상의 국가/지역에서 집계된 데이터를 바탕으로 순위를 매기는 차트에 7주 연속 진입해 눈길을 끌었다. 이 곡은 ‘타이완 송’(10위), ‘싱가포르 송’(25위) 등 세부 차트에도 이름을 올리며 글로벌 영향력을 입증했다. 또한 글로벌 오디오·음원 스트리밍 플랫폼 스포티파이의 14일 자 ‘데일리 톱 송 글로벌’ 차트에서는 전날 대비 11계단 상승해 탄탄한 뒷심을 자랑했다. ‘SPAGHETTI (feat. j-hope of BTS)’는 중독적인 후렴구로 ‘듣는 맛’을 주는 노래다. 여기에 다섯 멤버의 ‘보는 맛’ 넘치는 퍼포먼스가 어우러져 많은 사랑을 받았다. 한편 르세라핌은 26년 1월 31일~2월 1일 서울 잠실 실내체육관에서 월드투어의 앙코르 콘서트 ‘LE SSERAFIM TOUR ‘EASY CRAZY HOT’ ENCORE IN SEOUL’을 개최한다. 앞서 이들의 투어는 빌보드 박스 스코어가 집계한 ‘2025년 가장 흥행한 K-팝 투어 10선’(Top 10 Highest Grossing K-Pop Tours of the Year)...

title: 날아오는 배구공쯤은 가볍게 잡는 치어리더 [치얼UP영상]
content: ‘경기장의 꽃’ 치어리더는 더 이상 단순히 관중의 응원만을 이끄는 존재에 머물지 않는다. 관중과 선수를 연결하는 가교이자, 경기장 분위기를 극대화하는 주역으로 확실히 자리 잡았다. 이제 치어리더는 응원을 넘어 팬과 팀을 이어주는 중요한 스포츠 콘텐츠 창작자로 빛나고 있다. 스포츠 문화를 더욱 풍성하게 만드는 치어리더들의 매력을 가 현장에서 영상으로 담아 [치얼UP영상]에서 전한다. [마이데일리 = 대전 유진형 기자] 삼성화재 치어리더들이 11일 대전 충무실내체육관에서 열린 '진에어 2025-2026 V리그' 삼성화재와 현대캐피탈의 경기에서 응원하고 있다. 유진형 기자 zolong@mydaily.co.kr - c마이데일리( www.mydaily.co.kr ). 무단전재&재배포 금지 -
creator: 유진형 기자

title: 뷰런테크놀로지 '뷰원', 차량 SW 품질 'A-SPICE 레벨 2' 인증
content: AI 기반 인지 솔루션 전문기업 뷰런테크놀로지(이하 뷰런)는 자사의 ADAS용 라이다 인지 솔루션 ‘뷰원(VueOne)’이 자동차 소프트웨어(SW) 개발 프로세스 품질 인증인 ‘A-SPICE 레벨 2(Capability Level 2·CL2)’를 획득했다고 17일 밝혔다. 김재광 뷰런테크놀로지 대표는 “이번 인증으로 뷰런은 ‘뷰원’이 양산 단계에 필요한 엄격한 개발·검증 체계를 공식적으로 갖췄음을 입증하며, 글로벌 시장 진출을 위한 양산 체계 구축을 완료하게 됐다”고 밝혔다. A-SPICE(Automotive SPICE, 이하 A-SPICE)는 글로벌 완성차 업체들이 협력사의 자동차 소프트웨어 개발·관리의 품질과 역량을 검증하는 국제적 프로세스 평가 모델이다. 특히 레벨 2(CL2)는 시스템의 체계적인 관리와 품질 보장을 의미하며, 글로벌 OEM이 양산 파트너를 선정할 때 필수로 요구하는 자격 요건으로 통한다. 뷰런은 지난 3월 레벨 1(CL1)을 달성한 데 이어, 불과 7개월 만에 CL2 등급을 획득했다. 이는 일반적으로 Tier-1(차 부품사) 기업조차도 어려움을 겪는 인증 과정을 스타트업이 이례적으로 단기간 내 완료한 사례로, 뷰런의 차량용 소프트웨어 개발 및 품질 관리 역량이 글로벌 양산 기준을 완벽하게 충족하고 있음을 보여준다. 이를 기반으로 뷰런은 기술 검증 단계를 넘어 실제 차량 양산 적용 및 공급 협의를 본격화하고 있으며, 단순 기술 협력을 넘어 글로벌 OEM 및 Tier-1과의 양산 프로젝트 협업도 가시화될 전망이다. 이번 인증을 계기로 뷰런은 다수의 파트너사들과 주력...
creator: 김민지

title: "조두순이 옆집 이사 와도 알 수 없다"...신상정보 공개 5년 만료
content: [마이데일리 = 서기찬 기자] 아동 성폭행범 조두순(73)의 얼굴과 거주지 등 신상정보 공개 기간이 종료되면서, 일반 시민들이 더 이상 그의 구체적인 주거 정보를 확인할 수 없게 됐다. 16일 여성가족부에 따르면 ‘성범죄자알림e’ 웹사이트와 모바일 앱에 공개되어 있던 조두순의 사진, 신체 정보, 실제 거주지, 성범죄 요지 등은 지난 12일 자로 일제히 비공개 처리됐다. 이는 조두순이 지난 2020년 12월 출소할 당시 법원이 명령한 5년 간의 신상정보 공개 효력이 만료된 데 따른 조치다. 조두순은 2008년 초등학생을 상대로 잔혹한 성범죄를 저질러 징역 12년을 선고받았으며, 2020년 12월 복역을 마치고 출소했다. 당시 법원은 범행의 잔혹성과 사이코패스 성향, 재범 우려 등을 종합적으로 고려해 신상정보 공개 명령을 내렸다. 조두순의 공개 기간이 상대적으로 짧은 이유는 당시 청소년성보호법이 정한 신상정보 공개 기간이 양형과 무관하게 5년이었기 때문이다. 이후 법 개정을 통해 공개 기간이 최대 10년으로 늘어났으나, 조두순은 개정 전 형이 확정되어 해당 조항을 적용받지 못했다. 신상 정보는 가려졌지만 조두순에 대한 정부의 감시망은 유지된다. 법무부가 관리하는 신상정보 등록 의무는 2030년 12월 11일까지 유효하며, 전자발찌 부착과 전담 보호관찰관의 1대1 밀착 감시 역시 계속된다. 문제는 조두순이 출소 이후에도 거듭 보호관찰 규정을 어기며 돌출 행동을 보이고 있다는 점이다. 조두순은 그간 총 6차례에 걸쳐...
creator: 서기찬 기자

title: 사나, 파격 시스루에 깜짝...이렇게 과감해도 돼?
content: [마이데일리 = 이승길 기자] 그룹 트와이스 사나가 파격적인 스타일링으로 눈길을 사로잡았다. 사나는 12월 17일 자신의 SNS에 “레드 레더가 주는 좋은 느낌”이라는 멘트와 함께 여러 장의 사진을 게재했다. 사진 속 사나는 시스루 톱에 브라운 퍼 재킷, 그리고 회색 스커트를 매치해 도회적인 분위기를 연출했다. 여기에 강렬한 레드 컬러의 가죽 백으로 포인트를 더하며 고급스러운 감성을 완성했다. 특히 속이 은은하게 비치는 시스루 톱이 과감한 매력을 자아내며 팬들의 이목을 끌었다. 이를 본 팬들은 “사나야 화보 아니야?”, “컨셉 소화력 대박”, “예쁘고 섹시하고 다 해” 등의 반응을 보였다. 한편 사나가 속한 트와이스는 지난 12월 6일과 7일, 홍콩 카이탁 스타디움에서 월드투어 단독 공연을 성황리에 마쳤다. 이는 K팝 여성 그룹 최초로 해당 스타디움에 입성한 공연으로, 총 9만여 명의 팬들과 함께하며 전 회차 매진을 기록했다. 이승길 기자 winnings@mydaily.co.kr - c마이데일리( www.mydaily.co.kr ). 무단전재&재배포 금지 -
