title: Funding Package To Support South West FOGO
content: The Cook Government has offered a substantial $2.7 million funding package to assist South West local governments to maintain Food Organics and Garden Organics (FOGO) services, ensuring continued progress towards Western Australia’s waste-reduction and circular-economy priorities. The proposed South West FOGO Transport Rebate was detailed to councils following a series of meetings between the Environment Minister’s office, the Department of Water and Environmental Regulation, and South West councils’ CEOs and shire presidents. A structured rebate over a three-year period, starting at $75 per tonne, will assist councils to transport FOGO feedstock to licensed processing facilities while work continues on a long-term, regionally sustainable processing solution. The rebate will be administered under theWaste Avoidance and Resource Recovery Act 2007, ensuring funding supports objectives of WA’s waste strategy, Beyond WAste 2030. Local governments receiving the rebate will be required to demonstrate tonnages transported and take steps to reduce contamination to maintain the integrity of the system. The Cook Government will continue to work with councils and industry stakeholders to develop long-term infrastructure options, including regional transfer-station capacity and sustainable processing solutions. As stated by the Environment Minister Matthew Swinbourn: “A key responsibility of local governments is waste recovery, including FOGO, with many of the South West councils...
creator: The National Tribune

title: Farmer confidence holds steady in South Australia as late spring rain lifts yield expectations
content: Results at a glance: South Australian farmer confidence held relatively steady this quarter, as producers balanced improved seasonal conditions moving into harvest with tighter margins from rising input costs. Although the latest Rabobank Rural Confidence Survey, released today, saw SA’s net confidence soften marginally from eight per cent to six per cent, nearly a third of the state’s farmers still anticipate economic conditions will improve in the coming 12 months (31 per cent, down from 37 per cent last quarter). Fewer farmers also expect conditions will worsen (26 per cent, was 29 per cent) and more now predict conditions will stay the same (37 per cent, was 30 per cent). The cost of doing business has emerged as a key pressure point, with nearly half of SA farmers surveyed nominating input costs as a top concern (48 per cent, up from 39 per cent quarter-on-quarter). Drought worries also remained high, nominated by 41 per cent as a reason for concern, although this eased from 45 per cent last quarter thanks to late spring rain and a mild finish for winter crops. Rabobank state manager for South Australia Roger Matthews said seasonal sentiment reflected the variety of conditions faced by farmers across the state, and ongoing caution following prolonged dry. “Farmers on the Eyre Peninsula held the most optimistic outlook for the year ahead, followed by those in the South East,” he said. “While the Eyre Peninsula had harvest well underway and were probably surprised on the...
creator: The National Tribune

title: Equifax removes exclusivity in key contract with payroll and super data holder following ACCC investigation
content: The ACCC has accepted a court-enforceable undertaking from Equifax Australasia Workforce Solutions Pty Ltd in which Equifax has agreed not to enter into any new agreements preventing Equifax’s competitors from being able to access electronic payroll and superannuation data. Equifax is part of a corporate group which operates a large and well-established credit bureau in Australia. It has operated a verification exchange service in Australia since 2020. Payroll and superannuation data is used to provide automated income verification services across Australia, as many lenders are transitioning their income verification practices towards automated solutions. The undertaking offered by Equifax follows a detailed investigation by the ACCC into whether Equifax’s contracts amounted to unlawful exclusive dealing that had the purpose or likely effect of substantially lessening competition. The ACCC was particularly concerned about terms in the agreement Equifax entered into in 2021 with SuperChoice Services, one of the largest holders of payroll and superannuation data willing to supply data to third parties for income verification purposes. “Equifax’s contract prevented SuperChoice from supplying data to other Australian suppliers of income verification services and included a clause requiring SuperChoice to phase out sharing data with one of Equifax’s competitors,” ACCC Chair Gina Cass-Gottlieb said. “Whether it’s for home loans, car loans or a new credit card, consumers across...
creator: The National Tribune

title: Next round of lifesaving Community Defibrillator Fund now open
content: Community groups, sporting organisations, businesses and individuals are invited to apply for the second round of the Tasmanian Government’s Community Defibrillator Fund, with 90 lifesaving devices to be provided to communities across the State. This round delivers on the Tasmanian Government’s $500,000 commitment to provide 180 lifesaving Automatic External Defibrillators (AEDs) to communities across Tasmania. Minister for Health, Mental Health and Wellbeing, Bridget Archer, said this round is a critical opportunity for our communities to secure an AED and help save lives. “By increasing access to defibrillators, we can help keep hearts beating and give Tasmanians the best possible chance of survival,” Minister Archer said. “When someone suffers a cardiac arrest, every minute without CPR or defibrillation reduces their chance of survival by around 10%. “That’s why we’re urging community groups, businesses, and sporting organisations, especially in rural and regional areas, to take up this opportunity and apply for an AED.” AEDs are easy to use, require no prior training, and include audio instructions to guide the user through the process. Once installed, each device will be registered and visible through the GoodSAM Responder app, which alerts nearby responders and provides the location of both the patient in cardiac-arrest and the closest AED. “Earlier this year, our Government awarded 90 AEDs, and this round will deliver the remaining 90 devices committed at the 2024...
creator: The National Tribune

title: Victorian farm sector confidence climbs to four-year high
content: Key Facts: Results at a glance: ■ Improving seasonal conditions, strong commodity prices and international market opportunities drive sense of optimism for Victorian farmers. ■ Agricultural producers in the Western District are the most confident in the state. ■ In line with rising confidence, farmers’ investment intentions have also increased. Confidence among Victorian farmers continues to grow, with the state’s rural sentiment now at its highest point in more than four years, the latest Rabobank Rural Confidence Survey has found. Victoria was the only state in Australia to buck the national trend in the quarter four survey, released today, with farmers in all other states reporting a decline in confidence. The growing sense of optimism among Victoria’s rural sector was found to be influenced by expectations of improving seasonal conditions, positive commodity prices – particularly in the livestock sectors – and international market opportunities in the year ahead. The survey, completed last month, found net rural confidence in the state to be sitting at 24 per cent (up from 21 per cent in the previous quarter). This is the highest level recorded in Victoria since September 2021. The largest number of farmers in the state (45 per cent) were expecting farm business conditions to remain stable in the coming 12 months – up from 33 per cent with that view last quarter. The number expecting conditions to improve sat at 39 per cent – while this had declined slightly from 41 per...

title: 유연석·이제훈 84라인 통했다...‘틈만 나면’ 3단계 성공, 3.2% 출발
content: ‘틈만 나면,’ 유연석, 이제훈이 84라인 동갑내기 파워로 3단계 성공을 이뤄내며, 시즌4 첫 회부터 기세 좋은 포문을 열었다. 17일 닐슨코리아에 따르면 전날 방송된 SBS ‘틈만 나면,’(연출 최보필/작가 채진아) 36회는 전국 시청률 3.2%를 기록했다. 2MC 유재석, 유연석과 함께 ‘틈 친구(게스트)’ 이제훈, 표예진이 경복고, 일렉기타 전문점을 찾아가 ‘모범’적 팀플레이를 선사했다. 유재석, 유연석은 “3개월 만에 돌아왔다. 이제는 틈만 나면, 돌아오는구나 싶으실 것”이라며 변함없는 오프닝으로 반가움을 자아냈다. 이날 틈 친구로 SBS 금토드라마 ‘모범택시3’ 이제훈, 표예진이 등장했다. 유재석은 영화 ‘건축학개론’의 주역인 유연석, 이제훈과의 삼자대면이 이뤄지자 “제훈아 그때 열 받았지?”라고 했고, 이제훈은 “저 많이 울었죠. 너 수지 데려다 주고 뭐했어?”라며 장단을 맞춰 웃음을 자아냈다. 유재석, 유연석, 이제훈, 표예진이 찾아간 첫 번째 틈 주인은 경복고 농구부였다. 졸업 전 추억을 쌓기 위해 신청하게 됐다는 틈 주인은 풋풋한 학생들 간의 케미로 활기를 더했다. 이들의 첫 번째 틈 미션은 ‘슈팅 챌린지’였다. 1단계는 4명의 합산 점수가 3점이면 성공. 이제훈이 한 방에 3점슛으로 1단계를 성공시키며 ‘택시히어로’의 존재감을 입증하자, 학생들은 “김도기! 김도기!”라며 열광했다. 유재석은 “기적을 한 번 만들어보자”라며 마지막까지 열의를 다졌지만, 한 번의 보너스 쿠폰 기회까지 소진하며 아쉽게 2단계에서 실패했다....
creator: 이수진

title: “마지막 순간들 담았다” 극진한 손흥민 레전드 대우...토트넘 특별 다큐 예고
content: 손흥민 다큐멘터리 예고 장면. 사진=토트넘 SNS 캡처 잉글랜드 프리미어리그(EPL) 토트넘이 손흥민(LAFC) 다큐멘터리를 제작했다. 토트넘은 17일(한국시간) 소셜미디어(SNS)에 “벌써 일주일이 흘렀다”며 “손흥민의 마지막 순간들을 담은 스퍼스 오리지널 다큐멘터리가 곧 공개된다”고 전했다. 구단은 같은 날 오후 6시 30분 공식 유튜브에서 다큐멘터리를 시청할 수 있다고 홍보했다. 함께 올린 짤막한 영상에는 손흥민이 토트넘 홋스퍼 스타디움이 뒤로 보이는 의자에 앉아 인터뷰 전 슬레이트를 치는 모습이 담겼다. 다큐멘터리에는 지난 10일 토트넘 홋스퍼 스타디움을 방문한 손흥민의 모습이 담겼을 것으로 예상된다. 당시 손흥민은 오랜만에 토트넘 동료들과 만났고, 팬들에게 정식으로 작별 인사를 남겼다. LAFC 이적 후 처음으로 토트넘 홋스퍼 스타디움을 찾은 손흥민. 사진=EPA 연합뉴스 2015년 8월 토트넘에 입단한 손흥민은 지난 8월까지 10년 활약하며 ‘리빙 레전드’로 자리매김했다. 특히 그는 토트넘을 떠나기 직전인 2024~25시즌 주장으로 유럽축구연맹(UEFA) 유로파리그(UEL) 우승에 이바지하며 성공리에 런던 생활을 마쳤다. 손흥민은 지난 시즌 도중 이적설에 휩싸였지만, LAFC로 적을 옮기는 것은 2025~26시즌을 준비하던 8월에야 결정됐다. 당시 손흥민은 토트넘에 합류해 프리시즌을 보내고 있었고, 마침 한국 투어 기간 이적을 발표했다. 토트넘 현지 팬들과 인사할 기회 없이 LAFC로 넘어가게 됐다. 미국...
creator: 김희웅

title: 사면초가 쿠팡, 기회 노리는 토종 이마트의 승부수'팡 하면 쓱 오세요~'
content: 쿠팡의 개인정보 유출 사태가 장기화하는 가운데 ‘토종’ 이마트가 승부수를 띄웠다. SSG닷컴의 익일배송 서비스인 ‘쓱배송’ 무료 기준 완화에 이어 혜택을 강화한 멤버십 ‘쓱세븐클럽’을 공개하며 뜨거운 반응을 얻고 있다. 16일 SSG닷컴에 따르면 다음 달 출시 예정인 신규 유료 멤버십 ‘쓱세븐클럽’의 론칭 알림 사전 신청 고객 수가 20만명을 돌파했다. 쓱세븐클럽은 ‘장보기 결제 금액 7% 고정 적립’ 혜택에 온라인동영상서비스 ‘티빙’ 이용 혜택을 결합한 멤버십이다. 이와 함께 신세계백화점몰과 신세계몰 상품 할인 쿠폰도 제공한다. 업계 관계자는 “쿠팡에 밀렸던 이마트와 SSG닷컴이 실망한 쿠팡 고객들을 다시 끌어안기 위해 분투 중”이라고 분석했다. 국내 이커머스 1위 쿠팡은 개인정보 유출 사태 이후 이른바 ‘탈팡’(탈쿠팡) 분위기로 곤혹스러운 처지다. 김범석 쿠팡Inc 이사회 의장이 오는 17일 국회 과기정통위에서 열리는 쿠팡 청문회에 불참 의사를 밝히면서 여론은 더욱 악화하고 있다. 개인정보 유출 파문은 갈수록 장기화하는 모양새다. 서울경찰청 사이버수사과가 지난 9일 시작한 송파구 쿠팡 본사 압수수색은 16일까지 총 6차례 진행됐다. 확보한 자료가 방대해 추가 혐의 여부를 가리는 데도 시간이 소요될 것으로 전망된다. 리얼미터가 지난 11일 전국 유권자 503명을 대상으로 실시한 여론조사 결과 응답자의 68.4%는 공정거래위원회에 쿠팡에 대한 강제 조사권을 부여해야 한다고 답했다. 반면 반대 의견은 21.7%에...
creator: 서지영

title: 이주호 두 달 만에 배영 200m 또 한국 新..."이 정도에 만족하지 않겠다"
content: 이주호. 사진=대한수영연맹 제공 한국 수영대표팀 맏형 이주호(30·서귀포시청)가 두 달 만에 배영 200m 한국 신기록을 다시 작성했다. 이주호는 16일(한국시간) 호주 브리즈번에서 열린 2025 핸콕 프로스펙팅 퀸즐랜드 선수권대회 남자 배영 200m 결승에서 1분55초34의 한국 신기록으로 우승했다. 지난 10월 18일 부산에서 열린 제106회 부산 전국체육대회에서 작성한 한국 최고 기록(1분55초60)을 불과 두 달 만에 0.26초 더 앞당겼다. 이주호는 이번 한국 신기록으로 내년 아이치·나고야 아시안게임 우승 기대감을 키웠다. 2023년 항저우 아시안게임 남자 배영 200m 결승에서 쉬자위(중국)가 금메달을 딸 때 세운 기록이 1분55초37이었다. 이주호는 대한수영연맹을 통해 "2022 아시안게임 금메달리스트의 기록을 넘어섰고 올해 아시아 1위 기록인데, 이 정도에 만족하지 않겠다"면서 "1분54초대를 목표로 내년 아시안게임에서 꼭 금메달을 따고 싶다"고 각오를 전했다. 이주호를 포함한 경영 국가대표 14명은 문화체육관광부가 지원하는 '2025 전략종목 육성사업'의 일환으로 지난달 23일 호주로 해외 전지훈련을 떠났다.
creator: 이형석

title: 박찬욱 ‘어쩔수가없다’, 美아카데미 국제영화상 예비후보
content: ‘어쩔수가없다’ 포스터 박찬욱 감독의 영화 ‘어쩔수가없다’가 미국 최고 권위의 아카데미 시상식(오스카) 국제영화상 예비 후보에 이름을 올렸다. 미국 영화예술과학아카데미(AMPAS)는 16일(현지시간) 제98회 아카데미 시상식의 국제장편영화상, 주제가상, 다큐멘터리 장편·단편, 촬영, 분장, 시각효과 등 12개 부문의 예비 후보 명단을 발표했다. 국제영화상 부문에는 한국을 포함해 각국에서 총 86편이 출품됐으며, 이 가운데 15편이 예비 후보로 선정됐다. 박찬욱 감독의 ‘어쩔수가없다’는 자파르 파나히 감독의 ‘그저 사고였을 뿐’(프랑스), 이상일 감독의 ‘국보’(일본), 요아킴 트리에 감독의 ‘센티멘털 밸류’(노르웨이) 등과 함께 이름을 올렸다. 또한 넷플릭스 애니메이션 ‘케이팝 데몬 헌터스’의 사운드트랙 ‘골든’은 아카데미 주제가상 예비 후보로 선정됐다. 해당 부문에는 ‘위키드 포 굿’, ‘아바타: 불과 재’, ‘F1 더 무비’, ‘씨너스: 죄인들’ 등이 함께 포함됐다. 아카데미 시상식 최종 후보작은 내년 1월 22일 발표되며, 시상식은 내년 3월 15일 열린다. 한편 ‘어쩔수가없다’는 앞서 제83회 골든글로브 시상식에서 외국어(비영어)영화상과 뮤지컬·코미디 부문 작품상 후보에 올랐으며, 주연 배우 이병헌은 뮤지컬·코미디 부문 남우주연상 후보로 지명됐다. 또한 제31회 크리틱스 초이스 시상식에서도 외국어영화상과 각색상 후보에 이름을 올렸다.
creator: 이수진

title: Deep Yellow Limited (ASX:DYL) Tumas Project Update
content: Perth, Dec 17, 2025 AEST (ABN Newswire) - Deep Yellow Limited ( ASX:DYL ) ( JMI:FRA ) ( DYLLF:OTCMKTS ) provided an update on key developments at its flagship Tumas Project (Tumas or the Project). HIGHLIGHTS - Power supply agreement executed - Water supply and development agreements progressing - Detailed engineering more than 60% complete - Over 70% of all major equipment now tendered - Bulk earthworks 24% complete - Project debt financing continues to advance Deep Yellow Acting Chief Executive Officer Mr. Craig Barnes commented: "The execution of the power supply agreement with NamPower is another important step in advancing our preparation for the construction of the Tumas Project. Our strategy for the development of Tumas is unchanged, we will continue with the orderly derisking of the Project and ensure we are ready to reach FID when we are satisfied that the uranium market supports development of a greenfield project like Tumas." Power and Water Infrastructure Power Supply Deep Yellow's wholly owned subsidiary, Reptile Uranium Namibia (Pty) Ltd, and Namibia Power Corporation (Pty) Ltd (NamPower) executed the Transmission Power Supply Agreement for the Tumas Project (Power Supply Agreement). The Power Supply Agreement is subject to conditions precedent, including a final investment decision (FID) in relation to the Tumas Project. The Tumas Project will be connected to the Namibian regional grid through a purpose-built dedicated 22 km 220 kV power line with capacity of 4...

title: みずほFG インドの投資銀行を買収へ
기술주 반등 모색, 테슬라 주가 사상 최고치... 미 뉴욕 증시 혼조세 마감
content: [디지털데일리 박기록기자] 기술주의 반등이 나타났지만 미국 뉴욕 증시는 혼조세로 마감했다. 테슬라가 무인 로보택시 운행에 대한 기대감과 함께 포드의 전기차 시장 철수로 인한 반사효과 기대로 사상 최고치를 기록했다. 16일(현지시간) 미국 뉴욕 증시에서 다우존스30산업평균지수는 전일대비302.30포인트(-0.62%) 내린 4만8114.26에, 스탠더드앤드푸어스(S&P)500지수는 16.25포인트(-0.24%) 하락한 6800.26에 거래를 마쳤다. 반면 기술주 중심의 나스닥 지수는 54.049포인트(+0.23%) 오른 2만3111.46로 종료하면서 반등을 모색하는 모습이다. 이날 발표된 미국의 고용지표는 서로 엇갈려 미국의 추가 금리인하에 대한 확실한 기대를 주지는 못했다. 이날 공개된 미국의 실업률은 4.6%로 시장 예상치인 4.5%를 웃돌면서 2021년 9월 이후 최고치를 기록했다. 반면 11월 비농업 부문 신규 일자리는 6만4000개 증가해 시장 예상치인 4만5000명을 상회했다. 이날 개별주중에선 테슬라(+3.07%)가 돋보였다. 489.88 달러로 마감한 테슬라 주가는 장중 490.50달러를 넘어서기도 했다. 일론 머스크 최고경영자(CEO)가 완전 무인 상태로 로보 택시 시범 주행을 진행중이며 내년 1000대를 상용화할 것이란 전망이 나오면서 주가도 탄력을 받고 있다. 한편 비트코인 시세는 반등을 보였다. 17일 오전 8시(한국시간)기준 코인마켓캡에서 비트코인은 전일같은시간 대비1.81% 오른 8만7773달러에 거래되고 있다. 비트코인 시세가 반등하는 모습을 보이자 코인베이스, 비트마인,...
creator: 박기록 기자

title: Em derrota para Macron, Parlamento da França suspende reforma da Previdência
content: O Parlamento da França sacramentou a suspensão da impopular reforma da Previdência, idealizada pelo presidente Emmanuel Macron e adotada em 2023, ao aprovar o orçamento da seguridade social para 2026 nesta terça-feira (16). O placar foi apertado: 247 votos contra 232. A reforma aumentava gradativamente a idade da aposentadoria de 62 para 64 anos. Com a votação desta quinta, fica congelada, na prática, em 62 anos e 9 meses, até 2028, quando já estará no poder o sucessor de Macron — as eleições são em 2027. O congelamento da reforma foi uma concessão feita pelo atual primeiro-ministro centrista Sébastien Lecornu ao Partido Socialista, da esquerda moderada, para garantir a sobrevivência de seu gabinete, minoritário na Assembleia Nacional. Trata-se de uma vitória para Lecornu, mas uma derrota para Macron, que sempre afirmou que a reforma era intocável. Em 2023, o governo da então primeira-ministra Élisabeth Borne precisou recorrer a um dispositivo da Constituição, o artigo 49, alínea 3 (conhecido como 49.3), que permite aprovar um projeto de lei sem submetê-lo a votação. Lecornu, que assumiu o cargo em setembro, poderia ter feito o mesmo para aprovar o orçamento de 2026, mas se comprometeu a não usar o 49.3, como gesto de boa vontade em relação aos partidos. A suspensão da reforma dividiu a esquerda. Enquanto o partido França Insubmissa (LFI), mais radical, pregava a revogação total da mudança, os socialistas afirmavam que o congelamento era...
creator: andré fontenelle

title: MXene-based e-tattoos harvest energy and monitor health in real time
content: Dec 16, 2025 MXene-based e-tattoos harvest energy and monitor health in real time A multifunctional electronic tattoo that integrates energy harvesting, energy storage, and real-time biometric sensing into a single, skin-conformal platform. ( Nanowerk News ) Researchers at Boise State University have developed a breakthrough in wearable electronics: a multifunctional electronic tattoo (e‐tattoo) that integrates energy harvesting, energy storage, and real‐time biometric sensing into a single, skin‐conformal platform ( Advanced Science , "Multifunctional E‐Tattoos Based on Electrospun PVBVA Fibers Coated with Ti 3 C 2 T x MXene for Energy Harvesting, Energy Storage, and Biometric Sensing" ). The innovation leverages electrospun poly(vinyl butyral‐co‐vinyl alcohol‐co‐vinyl acetate) (PVBVA) fibers coated with titanium carbide (Ti3C2Tx) MXenes , offering a scalable, biocompatible, and durable alternative to conventional wearable devices that often rely on rigid substrates or external gels. Boise State University researchers designed a novel E-tattoo made from PVBVA fibers coated with Ti3C2Tx MXene to harvest energy directly from the human body, providing power for itself. The research demonstrates the E-tattoo's capability for charge storage and its potential for health monitoring through integrated ECG and EMG sensing, all within a single system that adheres directly to the skin. (Image: David Estrada) Electronic tattoos are ultra‐thin, flexible devices that adhere directly to...

title: Musk streitet sich mit Start-up um Twitter-Name
content: X habe den Namen aufgegeben und die Markenrechte sollten deswegen gelöscht werden, argumentierte die Firma Operation Bluebird in einem Antrag beim amerikanischen Patent und Markenamt. X kontert in einer Klage, das Start-up versuche «dreist, die weltbekannte Marke Twitter zu stehlen». Tech-Milliardär Musk hatte Twitter vor gut drei Jahren für rund 44 Milliarden Dollar gekauft. Später benannte er die Plattform in X um und liess konsequent alle Spuren des Namens Twitter ausradieren. Aus Sicht von Operation Bluebird zeugt dies davon, dass X keine Absicht habe, den alten Namen und das Logo zu nutzen - und will beides für sich haben. Man plane eine Website, die Twitter.new heissen solle, hiess es. X betonte im Gegenzug, die Umgestaltung von Website und App bedeute nicht die Aufgabe der Markenrechte am Namen Twitter und dem Logo. Musks Firma verwies auch darauf, dass Nutzerinnen und Nutzer bei Beiträgen weiterhin von Tweets statt Posts sprächen - und auch nach wie vor den Namen Twitter benutzten. Unter Twitter.new kann man sich unterdessen bereits Nutzernamen sichern. Laut Angaben auf der Website wurden bisher mehr als 145'000 Profilnamen beantragt.

Chefe de gabinete de Trump diz a revista que ele tem 'personalidade de alcoólatra'
content: A chefe de gabinete da Casa Branca, Susie Wiles, disse em entrevista publicada nesta terça-feira (16) pela revista Vanity Fair que o presidente dos Estados Unidos , Donald Trump , tem "personalidade de alcoólatra", que o vice, J. D. Vance, é um "teórico da conspiração" , e que a secretária de Justiça, Pam Bondi, "fez burrada" ao lidar com o caso Jeffrey Epstein . Chris Wipple, autor de um livro sobre chefes de gabinete da Casa Branca e jornalista que assina as reportagens na Vanity Fair, conversou com Wiles ao longo de todo o ano, um raro nível de acesso ao centro do poder nos EUA. Como o próprio repórter admite no texto, "a maioria das autoridades da Casa Branca só fala com a imprensa em off [de maneira reservada, sem autorizar que seu nome seja citado] ou muito ocasionalmente. Wiles, no entanto, respondeu abertamente quase todas as perguntas que lhe fiz ". Primeira mulher na história dos EUA a ocupar o cargo, Wiles é considerada a pessoa mais poderosa na Casa Branca depois de Trump. Tendo coordenado a campanha presidencial do republicano —"em momento algum cogitei a possibilidade de que perderíamos", disse—, ela foi vista como a arquiteta da sua vitória nas eleições de 2024 e diz ter a confiança total do presidente. Trump, depois da publicação da reportagem da Vanity Fair, disse não ter lido a matéria, mas afirmou que Wiles faz um "excelente trabalho". title: French court rules PSG owes Kylian Mbappe $70.5M in unpaid salary
content: A Parisian court ruled Tuesday that Kylian Mbappe is owed more than $70 million in unpaid salary by his former club Paris Saint-Germain.Mbappe, 26, scored a club-record 256 goals in seven years with PSG before leaving in May 2024 and later joining Real Madrid on a free transfer. Mbappe, the captain of France's national team, and the reigning European champions have since been embroiled in a dispute over alleged unpaid salary.The dispute stems from a "gentlemen's agreement" that PSG said Mbappe agreed to in August 2023. That followed a letter Mbappe sent the club two months before informing PSG that he did not intend to exercise a one-year option to extend his contract to June 2025.According to the club, two options that were part of the gentlemen's agreement included Mbappe extending his contract until June 2025 so that PSG could command a transfer fee, or Mbappe returning money to the club to help alleviate the financial hit from losing him to a free transfer.Mbappe's lawyers contested that there was no proof that such an agreement ever existed. Three days after he joined Real Madrid, PSG announced it was enacting the second option of the agreement, setting in motion the two-year dispute.Both sides appeared before the Conseil de prud'hommes de Paris last month, with Mbappe claiming nearly $310 million in total unpaid salary while PSG filed a counterclaim seeking $518 million in damages. While the court did not award Mbappe the full amount he sought in dismissing his...

title: Sydney funerals begin for Bondi Beach Hanukkah shooting victims
content: Sydney will pause in grief on Wednesday as funerals begin for some of the 15 people killed in Australia’s deadliest mass shooting in three decades — a Jewish Hanukkah celebration-turned-tragedy that shook the nation and intensified fears of rising antisemitism and violent extremism.Police are zeroing in on the alleged father-and-son shooters, Sajid Akram, 50, and his 24-year-old son named in local media as Naveed, as they probe possible links to Islamic State. Sajid was killed in a shootout with officers at the Bondi Beach park where the attack took place on Sunday.Investigators expect to question Naveed as early as Wednesday, once medication wears off and legal counsel is present, New South Wales Police Commissioner Mal Lanyon said. Naveed remains in a Sydney hospital after emerging from a coma.A funeral for Rabbi Eli Schlanger, an assistant rabbi at Chabad Bondi Synagogue and a father of five, will take place at 11 a.m. (0000 GMT).He was known for his work for Sydney’s Jewish community through Chabad, a global organization fostering Jewish identity and connection. Schlanger would travel to prisons and meet with Jewish people living in Sydney's public housing communities, Jewish leader Alex Ryvchin said on Monday.ALBANESE TO ATTEND FUNERALS IF INVITED, HE SAYSPrime Minister Anthony Albanese did not disclose whether he would attend any of the funerals."I would attend anything that I'm invited to; these funerals that are taking place are to farewell people's loved ones,"...

A large pool of blood and a long umbrella were left at the scene. The display includes more than 800,000 computerized lights choreographed to music and multiple attractions that run throughout the night.“We wanted to make sure that people still had the feeling of Christmas, but we also wanted them to see what it was like with the farm life, so we kind of mixed the two together,” said Robert Busse, co-owner of Christmas on the Farm. “We have multiple light shows that run at different points in the night and some other walk-throughs that you can experience.”Guests can explore at their own pace, visit a nativity scene during a hayride, see Highland cows and enjoy seasonal food and s’mores.Christmas on the Farm runs now through December 28. title: GoFundMe campaigns created for victims of destructive fire in Lebanon
content: After a 4-alarm fire destroyed several apartments and left 14 people, those effected and the community are rallying support through GoFundMe. After a 4-alarm fire destroyed several apartments and left 14 people and 2 pets displaced, those effected and the community are rallying support through GoFundMe campaigns. The fire broke out on Saturday night at 10:30 p. m. and firefighters fought the flames for five hours. One community member, Chelsea Balulis, hopes to raise several thousand dollars for Junerose Petronio, who was at work when the fire destroyed her apartment. "Anyone who knows June knows she is caring, funny, and truly a pleasure to be around - someone who always brings kindness and positivity to those around her," Balulis wrote. "Now, she is facing the overwhelming task of rebuilding after this unexpected loss." A couple whose apartment was destroyed is looking for support for themselves and their two cats. Jordan Laguer shared that he and his girlfriend are trying to cover the costs of a hotel and other basic necessities."Every bit of support will help us rebuild and get back on our feet after this unexpected disaster. We would truly appreciate any help you can offer, and we want to thank everyone who has reached out, especially the first responders who came to support and check on us," Laguer shared under his GoFundMe.Authorities are investigating after an individual was stabbed multiple times and hit in the head with a baseball bat on Sunday morning.The...

title: Czinger Reclaims Laguna Seca Lap Record From Koenigsegg, Again
content: Czinger has once again taken the Laguna Seca lap record from Koenigsegg, marking the fifth time the record has changed hands between the two brands since 2021. This time, Czinger's record-breaking lap of 1:22.30 was nearly two seconds faster than Koenigsegg's previous best. Czinger reclaimed Laguna Seca ’s lap record from Koenigsegg again. The two brands have now traded the record five times since 2021. This time it wasn’t close, with Czinger ahead by nearly two seconds. If you've lost track of who owns the production car lap record at Laguna Seca , don't stress. So has everyone else outside of Koenigsegg and Czinger because only those two have gone at it for almost half of the decade. Now, it's traded hands once more, and it wasn't particularly close. This particular saga started back in July 2021, when Czinger shocked the industry by running a 1:25.44 in its not-yet-production-ready 21C, beating the McLaren Senna’s long-standing benchmark. Koenigsegg eventually responded in August 2024 during Monterey Car Week with a 1:24.86 lap in the Jesko, only for Czinger to return days later and shave it down to 1:24.75. More: Laguna Seca Noise Concerns Muffled As Neighbors Drop Lawsuit Earlier this year, Czinger took a production-spec 21C across the country and set five lap records, including one at Laguna Seca, where it scored a 1:24.39. content: Police say a suspect fleeing from the Philadelphia Sheriff's Department crashed into them on Monday morning. Tuesday, December 16, 2025 10:38PMAn Uber driver's wife is speaking out after her husband was critically injured and his passenger was killed when police say a suspect fleeing from the Philadelphia Sheriff's Department crashed into them Monday morning. Police said Stephen Thompson, 51, was driving for Uber driven by 35-year-old Joseph Cini, who was allegedly fleeing officers. Investigators said Cini ran from the scene after the collision and is still at large."When I answered the phone and the officer identified himself, I just froze," said Thompson's wife, Jenelle Thompson. title: Texas sues utility over wildfire causing $1 billion damage, 3 deaths
content: Texas has sued the utility company whose downed power lines sparked the largest wildfire in state history, a deadly blaze that destroyed homes and livestock. AUSTIN, Texas — Texas has sued the utility company whose downed power lines sparked the largest wildfire in state history, a deadly blaze that destroyed homes and livestock and charred miles of landscape, causing more than $1 billion in damage. The lawsuit filed Tuesday by state Attorney General Ken Paxton accuses Southwestern Public Service Company, which operates in Texas as Xcel Energy, of negligence in its upkeep of aging utility poles. It seeks to recover economic damages incurred by the state and prevent the company from passing those costs on to customers. The Smokehouse Creek fire killed three people in 2024, burning through more than 1,500 square miles in Texas before spilling into neighboring Oklahoma. Texas A&M Forest Service investigators determined it was ignited when a decayed utility pole snapped and fell, dropping Xcel power lines onto dry grass.The Minnesota-based company has acknowledged its equipment appeared to have sparked the wildfire. But the lawsuit claims the company had neglected to replace aging utility poles in the windswept Panhandle, some of which were nearly 100 years old and more than twice their typical lifespan of 40 years. "Xcel's blatant negligence killed three Texans and caused unfathomable destruction in the Texas Panhandle," Paxton said. "The company made false representations...

title: Prescott man sentenced to 10 years in prison for attempting to kill unborn baby
content: A Prescott man was sentenced Monday to 10 years in prison for restraining his wife and attempting to kill their unborn baby, the Yavapai County Attorney's Office announced. A Prescott man was sentenced Monday to 10 years in prison for restraining his wife and attempting to kill their unborn baby, the Yavapai County Attorney's Office announced.Justin Noecker, 43, will serve seven years of supervised probation after his prison sentence. In October 2024, Prescott police and the Yavapai County Sheriff's Office were called to a home outside Prescott city limits. The victim had told police she had recently learned she was nine weeks pregnant.While the victim said she and Noecker were looking forward to having the child, the two had a fight in the days after learning about the pregnancy.During that fight, Noecker told her he would give her an abortion, and then restrained her and repeatedly stomped on her stomach.She was taken to the hospital, but the baby did not survive.While the baby's cause of death could not be determined, Noecker was charged with attempted murder as he believed the baby was alive at the time of the crime, according to the Yavapai County Attorney's Office.County Attorney Dennis McGrane is also calling on the state legislature to increase the penalties for crimes of this nature after this incident. title: 10 Best TV Comedies of 2025, Ranked
content: 'Only Murders in the Building,' 'The Studio,' 'Hacks,' and 'It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia' are among the best TV comedies of 2025. The year of 2025 delivered some truly phenomenal new seasons of television, with the suspenseful and emotionally devastating second season of Severance, and the promising first seasons of The Pitt and Pluribus. This year's TV dramas were firing on all cylinders with their shocking plot twists, emotionally gutting season finales, and powerful themes. That said, 2025 was also an excellent year for comedy TV shows, from sitcoms, to dramedies, to dark comedies. This year, these series delivered bigger laughs, powerful emotional moments, and exciting new storylines – often all at the same time, without missing a beat. These are the best TV comedies of 2025, ranked. 10 'Only Murders in the Building' Season 5 Season 5 of Only Murders in the Building sees Charles , Oliver , and Mabel investigating the murder of Lester , The Arconia's beloved doorman. Along the way, the trio get involved in a massive conspiracy involving three billionaires and a secret casino being run beneath the Arconia, and they also almost see the Arconia get sold and destroyed to become entirely a casino. The fifth season of Only Murders in the Building is a funny, emotional season that does a deep-dive into both Lester's history at the Arconia, as well as each Arconia resident's connection to him. title: Nick Reiner to be charged with parents' murder
content: The 32-year-old is accused of stabbing his parents, Rob and Michele Reiner, to death inside their Brentwood home Sunday. Nick Reiner, the son of Rob Reiner and Michele Singer Reiner, will be charged with their murder. Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced two counts of first-degree murder with special circumstances. The charges are expected to be formally filed Tuesday afternoon. If convicted on all charges, he faces a maximum sentence of life in prison without parole or death, Hochman said. Nick Reiner was expected to appear in court Tuesday morning, but that was postponed due to lack of medical clearance. Hochman said Reiner is currently going through standard medical clearance, which is protocol. RELATED: Rob and Michele were found dead inside their Brentwood home Sunday, Dec. 14 around 3:30 p.m. Their daughter, 28-year-old Romy Reiner, reportedly found them and called 911. Nick was located Sunday night around 9:15 p.m. in the Exposition Park area of Los Angeles and taken into custody without incident. He was booked for murder the following morning. He is currently being held without bail. Officials said the Reiners were stabbed to death. A knife was used in the killing, Hochman said. While a motive for the deadly attack is unknown, several sources say Rob, Michele, and Nick attended Conan O’Brien's Christmas party the night before they were killed. Those who attended say a loud and heated argument erupted between Nick and Rob. According to TMZ,...

title: Last-Minute Holiday Gifts: Tech Gadgets for Everyone on Your List
content: Discover practical and useful tech gifts perfect for last-minute holiday shopping, including portable chargers, car emergency kits, and air quality monitors. ArticleBody:Some people get their holiday shopping done on a responsible schedule. They budget, strategize, and stay organized for a stress-free season. Then there's the rest of us. Last-minute holiday shopping is a time-honored tradition and we're here to help make it a lot easier. So this year, skip the gift cards and get everyone on your list gear they actually want. Portable chargers don’t typically have the electrical oomph needed to keep up with a powerful laptop. This burly bank, however, can output up to 220W spread across three USB ports . It supports fast charging up to 140W, which is plenty of power, even for souped-up MacBook Pros and portable gaming rigs. The built-in display and companion app let you track performance and temperature as you charge so you can ensure things are going smoothly. The best gifts are things someone needs, but would never buy for themselves. This compact little box is an essential piece of emergency gear for anyone with a car. The built-in compressor can top off the air in a tire, while the integrated LED can light the way in the dark. The built-in battery can charge smartphones and other devices, but more importantly, it’s powerful enough to jump start the car itself. Batteries get finicky, especially in winter, which makes a jump starter a no-brainer for any roadside emergency...

title: Unclaimed packages booth brings surprise shopping to Philly's Christmas Village
content: Some packages that missed their final destination have landed at the Christmas Village in Philadelphia, specifically booth 119 at the City Hall courtyard. Tuesday, December 16, 2025 10:41PMSome packages that missed their final destination have landed at the Christmas Village in Philadelphia, specifically booth 119 at the City Hall courtyard. The unclaimed mail remains wrapped, each one a mystery for shoppers who pay between $10 and $40 before the big reveal. "So our motto is, 'You get what you get, you don't get upset.' So really, you can open literally anything, but people are always excited to watch other people open them," said Emma Zielinski, the owner of Chain Mail Unclaimed. Zielinski said she uses a broker who sources parcels from suppliers and warehouses before they're discarded. "I saw it on TikTok. Someone did it at a farmer's market in Paris, and she's like, 'It's the coolest thing I did in Paris.' And I couldn't stop thinking about it. I was like, I would never be able to say no to that as a customer because it's so low risk, high reward. So I was like, 'We should start this,'" Zeilinski said.The Christmas Village is open through Christmas Eve. Click We have summarized this news so that you can read it quickly. If you are interested in the news, you can read the full text here. title: Romeoville police officer shot, suspect charged after hours-long manhunt
content: Officer injured in Romeoville shooting recovering, police say A Romeoville police officer is recovering and a suspect has been charged after an intense search early Thursday morning, police said. Police arrested the 29-year-old suspect, who was out on parole and has an extensive criminal history, after an hours-long manhunt, police said. Romeoville police said they spotted a stolen car in a neighborhood near Sierra Trail and Summerfield Drive. When they went to investigate, the suspect, later identified as Samer Hernandez, returned to where the car was and police said he opened fire at officers, hitting one in the shoulder. The officer was rushed to the hospital just after midnight.Romeoville Police Chief Ken Kroll says a suspect was arrested after a Romeoville police officer was shot Thursday morning.That's when the manhunt started. At one point, a lockdown was issued for parts of the area. Romeoville police, along with the Will County Sheriff's Office, Illinois State Police, SWAT teams, K9s, drones and dozens of other agencies searched and managed to find the suspect about five hours later, at around 5:45 a.m. "He was found less than a mile away from where the incident took place in a backyard," Chief Kroll said. "He was hiding in some shrubbery.""I guess he was hiding in this little corner," said Miranda Kranenborg, whose yard Hernandez was hiding in. She spoke exclusively with ABC7 Chicago. "He came in through this little gated area back here." Kranenborg was sheltering...

title: Bonkers 'Project Hail Mary' Replacement Announced at Paramount
content: Paramount Skydance logo. Paramount is going into space, and they're going to have a good time doing it. They've optioned a science fiction novella from acclaimed horror author Grady Hendrix with the unlikely title BadAsstronauts, and an even unlikelier premise. It's a tale of a DIY space rescue that must be read to be believed. According to reports, the film will be produced by Todd Garner and Adam Goldworm , with Hendrix executive producing; no director or actors have yet been attached to the project. The novella tells the tale of Walter Reddie, a washout astrophysicist whose cousin gets stranded on the abandoned International Space Station. With no rescue mission on its way from any official space agency, Walter takes matters into his own hands, building his own spacecraft to rescue his cousin from the merciless vacuum of space. Pretty soon, he's assembled a team of weirdos and wannabes who will be the first ever...BadAsstronauts. On his website, Hendrix describes the novel as hard science fiction...by which he means,"it's fiction about science and I probably got most of it wrong because I can’t science no matter how hard I try." Who Is Grady Hendrix? A native of Charleston, South Carolina, author Hendrix broke out with the novel Horrorstör, which centered around a haunted IKEA-like furniture store. He is reportedly the second-highest selling horror author in the world, after Stephen King. Several of his novels and short stories have been optioned for the screen,...

title: New Plant-Based Plastic Breaks Down Quickly Without Microplastics
content: Japanese researchers have developed a plant-based plastic made from cellulose that is strong during use but rapidly decomposes in natural settings, avoiding the microplastic problem often associated with biodegradable plastics. This new material offers a potential solution to plastic pollution by breaking down quickly and completely in the environment. Plastic pollution has proven stubbornly resistant to quick fixes. Even so-called biodegradable plastics often linger in the environment, breaking down into microplastics that spread through ecosystems and bodies alike. Now, researchers in Japan say they have created a plant-based plastic that sidesteps that trap. The material stays strong during use, yet breaks down rapidly in natural settings without leaving microscopic debris behind.The work comes from researchers led by Takuzo Aida at the RIKEN Center for Emergent Matter Science . In a new study, the team describes a plastic made from cellulose, the most abundant organic compound on Earth.The material combines durability, flexibility, and fast decomposition, pushing biodegradable plastics closer to practical reality.Microplastics have become a global contaminant. Scientists have detected them in oceans, soils, wildlife, and crops. Studies have also found them in human tissue and blood, where they may cause harm.Many biodegradable plastics fail to solve the problem. They degrade slowly in seawater or fragment into microplastics before fully breaking down.Cellulose-based...

The outgoing city comptroller, who last week announced his run against Democrat Manhattan Rep. title: Dallas County Republicans to vote on paper, hand-count ballots for 2026 Primary Election
content: Dallas County Republican voters will notice a change in the voting process for the 2026 Primary Election in March. Dallas County Republican voters will notice a change in the voting process for the 2026 Primary Election in March.For the first time in many years, the Democratic and Republican parties in Dallas County will not have a joint primary election. Instead, for the March primary, Republicans will have about 100 fewer polling locations. They will also vote on paper ballots that will be counted by hand.Under the rules, parties control the primaries. While it has been standard for a while that parties have joint elections, they do not have to.The changes only apply to election day, not early voting, which is controlled by the county.Dallas County GOP Chair Allen West said the party wants to try something different to see if they can make the process better. "I think when you consider Albert Einstein, when he said the pure definition of insanity is to continue to do the exact same thing and think you're going to get different results. And so why would we not want to look at some other course of action? And that's what we came up with. To say, let's go back and see," West said.While he did not allege any voter fraud, he cited failures with electronic voting. An electronic pollbook gave thousands of Dallas County voters the wrong ballot during the 2024 presidential election."Well, it’s not just the Dallas County GOP. I think that all voters in Dallas County should be very...

title: Highway 410 in Enumclaw reopens after significant damage
content: Frank Sumrall is the lead editor for MyNorthwest originally from the North Bay in California. Highway 410 between Enumclaw and Greenwater reopened on Tuesday despite the Enumclaw Police Department stating the conditions had “significantly worsened” and would be closed “for quite some time.” Eastbound and westbound SR 410 traffic will alternate in the westbound lane by use of a temporary traffic signal near Farman Street N. in Enumclaw, the Washington State Department of Transportation announced.WSDOT crews placed more rock along the highway to help stabilize the washed-out road. “WSDOT will be out to assess the damage and determine a solution soon, but with the extensive damage across the region, we are not sure when to have an exact answer,” the Enumclaw Police Department stated. “As soon as we know more, we will post the information. For now, Greenwater Fire is continuing to work diligently to provide assistance to the folks up the hill who need it the most.” Seventeen miles of the highway were closed. The damaged part of the highway is near milepost 25. The Greenwater Fire Department established daily convoys to transport people between Enumclaw and Greenwater, with two round-trip convoys per day.Blizzard warning issued for Cascades and Olympics as up to two feet of snow loomsThe National Weather Service in Seattle issued a High Wind Warning for large portions of Western Washington, with forecasters warning of damaging winds.Many major roadways remain closed in western...

title: Trump admin threatens retaliation against Spotify and others over EU tech regulation
content: The USTR threatened retaliatory measures against EU service providers over what it claims are “discriminatory” actions by the EU. The Office of the US Trade Representative posted on X Tuesday, claiming that US service providers have been hit by “a continuing course of discriminatory and harassing lawsuits, taxes, fines, and directives” from the EU. Earlier this month, X was fined $140 million under the EU’s Digital Services Act , in addition to new laws, fines, and investigations that have affected US tech giants like Google, Apple, Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta over the past few years. The unsigned post specifically named several European tech companies: Accenture, Amadeus, Capgemini, DHL, Mistral, Publicis, SAP, Siemens, and Spotify. It claimed that if the “discriminatory” activity continued, then the US would respond, and that “U.S. law permits the assessment of fees or restrictions on foreign services, among other actions.” In a statement given to the New York Times and AFP, European Commission spokesperson Thomas Regnier said in response that it would continue to work with the US to implement a trade deal, and that “As we have made clear many times, our rules apply equally and fairly to all companies operating in the EU. We will continue to enforce our rules fairly, and without discrimination.” >US Trade Representative: >The European Union and certain EU Member States have persisted in a continuing course of discriminatory and harassing lawsuits, taxes, fines, and...

title: US Issues Travel Warning to Thailand-Cambodia Border Amid Rising Tensions
content: The United States government has issued a travel warning to Americans regarding the Thailand-Cambodia border due to escalating armed conflict and an unpredictable security situation. The warning advises against all travel within 50 kilometers of the border, citing active hostilities and limited U.S. emergency service capabilities. Fighting between the two countries, stemming from a territorial dispute, has resulted in casualties and displacement. As tensions increase between Thailand and Cambodia , the United States government is warning Americans about traveling to the border area of the two countries. The U.S. Embassy in Thailand issued a security alert to American tourists Dec. 16, warning of an 'escalation of armed conflict' at the popular Asian destination. 'U.S. citizens should avoid all travel within 50 kilometers of the Thailand-Cambodia border, due to active hostilities and the unpredictable security situation,' the alert said. title: Brewton Middle School students tackle local issues during Learning Liberty Foundation’s American Character Program
content: The students did projects on everything from feeding those in need, to mental health awareness and helping animals in need. ) - For ten weeks, Brewton Middle School students have been taking part in the Liberty Learning Foundation’s American Character Program which sent them out into the community to see what problems are impacting those closest to them. “To get involved in their community, to find a worthy cause that really calls to them and finds a place in their heart or their mind that they can get out in the community, get their hands dirty so to speak and become part of the process,” said Ryan Foster, Vice President of Regional Development for Southwest Alabama. The students presented their projects to their teachers, community members and elected officials like State Representative Alan Baker. Some of the projects centered around bringing help to those in need like animals and people facing food insecurities. “The government had a shutdown, so we decided to give back to our community and the homeless. People weren’t able to get food stamps and stuff like that. We got donations from other people,” said Damian Spears. While others centered around awareness for personal causes like suicide prevention and mental health awareness. “We’ve all dealt with mental health before, we’ve all seen people deal with mental health before, we’ve seen it ourselves,” said Ashelia Emmerich. “We decided nobody should be alone dealing with that.” “I myself have gone through a bad road and...

title: Local group look to stall Midtown South Rezoning over environmental concerns
content: A Manhattan community group has filed a lawsuit seeking to overturn the city’s landmark rezoning of Midtown South, alleging the outgoing Adams administration A Manhattan community group has filed a lawsuit seeking to overturn the city’s landmark rezoning of Midtown South , alleging the outgoing Adams administration and city planning officials violated state environmental law and New Yorkers’ constitutional right to a healthy environment. , alleging the outgoing Adams administration and city planning officials violated state environmental law and New Yorkers’ constitutional right to a healthy environment.) plan permits residential development in 42 blocks spanning between West 23rd and 40th Streets and Fifth and Eighth Avenues. Over 2,800 of the planned 9,500 residences would be rent-regulated affordable units. The petition, filed in New York State Supreme Court last week on behalf of the Midtown South Community Council, argues the MSMX, one of the city’s largest neighborhood rezonings in decades, was approved without legally required mitigation for significant environmental impacts disclosed in the city’s own environmental review.The lawsuit claims that the city violated the State Environmental Quality Review Act , the City Environmental Quality Review process, and the state’s Green Amendment, which guarantees residents the right to clean air and a healthy environment. content: Oakland police are seeking the public's help in identifying a suspect involved in a violent carjacking that occurred in October. A 77-year-old rideshare driver was injured in the incident and required hospitalization. The police have released a surveillance image of the suspect and are asking for any information that may lead to an arrest. Oakland Police Seek Suspect in Violent Carjacking that Injured Rideshare Driver\ Oakland police have released a surveillance image of a suspect involved in a brutal carjacking incident that occurred in downtown Oakland during October. The victim, a 77-year-old rideshare driver, was seriously injured during the attack and required hospitalization. The incident underscores the ongoing concerns about crime and safety within the city, particularly in the downtown area. Authorities are actively pursuing leads and have urged the public to assist in identifying the individual responsible for this violent act. The investigation is being led by the Oakland Police Department, who are working diligently to gather evidence, interview witnesses, and analyze forensic data to bring the perpetrator to justice.\According to the Oakland Police Department, the carjacking took place on October 1st. The rideshare driver, a resident of Half Moon Bay, had just completed a drop-off and was sitting in his parked Toyota Prius when the attack unfolded. title: Judge sets $3M bond for man accused of killing wife with a hammer
content: A judge has set bond at $3 million for a man accused of killing his wife.Austen Medek appeared in court Tuesday morning, several months after his wife, 41-year- Austen Medek appeared in court Tuesday morning, several months after his wife, 41-year-old Michaela Medek, was found dead in their home back in September. When officers arrived at the Medeks' home, they found Austen doing chest compressions on his wife, a mother of three, in the upstairs bedroom. Police reported seeing blood on her face, on the ground around her head, and a hammer above her head. Austen Medek, 39, said he and his wife had been arguing that night. He told police that Michaela went to bed while he stayed downstairs. He said he then heard a "thump" from upstairs and ran up to find her on the floor.The Fairfield County Coroner's office conducted an autopsy last month, however, oncluding her cause of death was blunt force trauma, committed in a homicide."I can't believe that," neighbor Landon Bradley said."Unless they had problems behind closed doors that they kept out of the public eye," Bradley said in disbelief. "But besides that, when they were outside, they were cordial." Another point of contention with neighbors was the original findings of no foul play, followed by the coroner's report. title: Grand Central train shed rebuild: MTA partners with Chase and Vornado on financing reconstruction of
content: Top MTA officials announced on Tuesday the continuation of one public-private partnership and the launch of another to help rebuild the next two stretches of The MTA announced the continuation of one public-private partnership and a new one to rebuild the next two legs of a “ train shed ” underneath Park Avenue.officials announced on Tuesday the continuation of one public-private partnership and the launch of another to help rebuild the next two stretches of a The MTA announced it has partnered with the bank JP Morgan Chase and the firm Vornado Realty Trust, to oversee construction work on the next two phases of the project. The train shed, which runs beneath Park Avenue from 42nd to 57th Streets, is where 98% of Metro-North Railroad trains entering the station are sorted to the platforms where they will load their passengers. Chase will lead construction work on the second leg of the project, from East 46th to East 50th Streets, while Vornado will handle the third section, running between East 50th and East 53 Streets. title: Nick Reiner facing 2 counts of first-degree murder, LA prosecutors say
content: Rob Reiner’s son Nick Reiner will be charged with two counts of first-degree murder in the killing of his parents, Los Angeles County prosecutors said Tuesday. Flowers cover the Walk of Fame star for Rob Reiner on Monday, Dec. 15, 2025, in the Hollywood section of Los Angeles. Nick Reiner, 32, will be charged in the death of the 78-year-old actor and director Rob Reiner and his wife Michele Singer Reiner, District Attorney Nathan Hochman announced at a news conference with LA Police Chief Jim McDonnell. Prosecutors plan to file the charges, two counts of first degree murder special circumstances of multiple murders, later Tuesday. They will also include a special allegation that he used a dangerous weapon, a knife. The announcement of the charges came two days after the couple was found dead from apparent stab wounds in their home in the upscale Brentwood neighborhood of Los Angeles. Nick Reiner was arrested on suspicion of the killing and jailed hours later.Nick Reiner, son of Rob and Michele Reiner, arrested after couple found dead in home Nick Reiner had been expected to make an initial court appearance earlier Tuesday, but his attorney Alan Jackson said he was not brought from the jail to the courthouse for medical reasons and the appearance would not come before Wednesday.Rob Reiner was the Emmy-winning star of the sitcom “All in the Family” who went on to direct films including “When Harry Met Sally...” and “The Princess Bride.” He was an outspoken liberal activist for...

title: Nick Reiner Felt ‘Immense Pressure’ in Dad’s Shadow: Friend
content: The close confidant of the younger Reiner said he doesn’t believe he was truly pursuing recovery. New details about the mindset of Rob Reiner’s son and suspected killer Nick Reiner suggest that the 32-year-old felt pessimistic about making his own mark on the entertainment industry. Nick Reiner, who is being held without bail for the murder of his parents, Rob and Michele Reiner, felt “immense pressure” to live up to his famous father’s film industry legacy, according to his friend and podcast host Dave Manheim. The couple was found deceased at their Brentwood home on Sunday by their daughter, Romy, 28., because “he was young and smart and handsome and new in recovery,” and “because I was such a fan of Rob Reiner.” It was that last detail that led the younger Reiner to ultimately cut contact with Manheim, who tried to get him to convince his father to come on the show. Before Reiner cut ties, he seemed frustrated with getting his creative projects off the ground, Manheim recalled, and living up to his famous lineage, which, aside from his father, included a successful photographer mother and his comedy legend grandfather Carl Reiner. “I think big-picture, when you’re up against Rob Reiner and Carl Reiner, and you’re a struggling drug addict, the pressure is immense because how accomplished is anybody at age 24?” Manheim told the publication. title: LIVE: Police provide update in search for Brown University shooting suspect
content: Authorities on Tuesday released a new video timeline and a slightly clearer image of the man suspected in the Brown University shooting. PROVIDENCE, R.I. — Authorities on Tuesday released a new video timeline and a slightly clearer image of the man suspected in theInvestigators have been canvassing Providence homes, yards and dumpsters in search of videos or other clues that might help them figure out who was behind Saturday’s campus shooting, which killed two students and wounded nine others. In all of the videos made public, the suspect’s face was masked or turned away, and authorities have only been able to give a vague description of him as being stocky and about 5 feet, 8 inches tall. Authorities in Providence, Rhode Island release “enhanced” video of the person of interest in the Brown University shooting. In addition to releasing the slightly clearer image of the suspect, the FBI put out a video timeline that includes new footage of the man that was shot before the attack. It shows him running at times along quiet and empty residential streets near campus. With the killer still at-large, Providence is understandably tense, and additional police were sent to city schools on Tuesday to reassure worried parents that their kids will be safe. title: 2025 NFL MVP Stock Watch: Bo Nix has Broncos Streaking, Scrambling Into MVP Convo
content: It's time to acknowledge the Broncos are more than just lucky, and that their quarterback is a big reason for their NFL-best record. Winners of 10 one-score games this season and riding an 11-game winning streak, it’s time to acknowledge the Denver Broncos are not the luckiest team in the NFL. Holding a 12-2 record, tops in the NFL, the Broncos are the best. And while the Broncos have one of the nastiest defenses in the NFL, one of the main reasons for Denver’s success has been the clutch performance of second-year quarterback Bo Nix. The Oregon product’s raw numbers aren't among the best in the league, but he's played well when it mattered the most, as he did against the Green Bay Packers on Sunday. He threw for 302 yards, four touchdowns and zero interceptions, posting a season-high 134.7 passer rating in the 34-26 victory. Nix's 11 straight wins ties Lamar Jackson , Peyton Manning and Dan Marino for the longest win streak by a quarterback in his second season ever. Nix also ties Ben Roethlisberger, Andrew Luck and Dak Prescott for the second most quarterback wins his first two seasons . For the year, Nix is ninth in total passing yards , tied for fifth in touchdown passes and 18th in passer rating . The Broncos have done an excellent job of protecting Nix, as he’s been sacked an NFL-low 16 times this season. However, what has been the separator for Nix has been his ability to improvise and create second-reaction plays. Nix has been on the run on 26.8% of his drop-backs...

title: Jewish teens bond at Valley Beth Shalom’s holiday party in Encino
content: Teens from around Los Angeles County came together Saturday night to celebrate in unity, community and with lots of fun. Naomi Dvir, 15, of Agoura, top, and Julia Feinblum, 14, of Century City pose for silly pictures at the Jewish Teen Hanukkah Bash at Valley Beth Shalom in Encino on Saturday, Dec. 13, 2025. Despite the tumultuous times earmarking the start of Hanukkah, including a mass shooting in Australia on Sunday and a shooting at a home in Redlands on Monday investigated as a possible hate crime, teens from around Los Angeles County came together Saturday night to celebrate in unity, community and with lots of fun. For the first time, Valley Beth Shalom in Encino hosted a Jewish Teen Hanukkah Bash with about 100 teens from different area synagogues including Northridge and Santa Clarita. “Tonight is all about getting connection from all these teenagers across Los Angeles who are Jewish, to have a night of fun and group camaraderie,” said Maddy Begley, youth engagement manager with Valley Beth Shalom. “The whole goal of it is we have all these different synagogues and Jewish organizations coming together for one night of fun.” She said that the long-term goal of the event is to start having more opportunities for regional get-togethers for Jewish teens. “This came about because I wanted my teenagers here at Valley Beth Shalom to get to know other kids from across Los Angeles,” Begley said. “This is all for the teenagers to have connections with others beyond their own...

title: OpenAI launches GPT-Image 1.5 with faster edits to rival Gemini’s Nano Banana Pro
content: OpenAI launches GPT-Image 1.5, bringing faster image generation, sharper edits, and a new visual-first workspace to ChatGPT users worldwide. AI image generation models took a major leap throughout 2025, and OpenAI is pushing that momentum into the year’s final stretch.On Tuesday, the company released GPT-Image Model 1.5, its newest image generator, promising faster performance, stronger instruction-following, and more precise editing tools. The new model is available immediately to all ChatGPT users worldwide and through OpenAI’s API under the name GPT-Image-1.5.OpenAI also introduced a dedicated image creation space inside ChatGPT’s sidebar, complete with preset styles and trending designs. The update marks a shift away from simple chat-based image prompts toward a more visual-first workflow.“Many people’s first experience with ChatGPT involves turning a text prompt into a picture,” Fidji Simo, CEO of applications at OpenAI, wrote in a blog post.“It’s a magical way to see what this technology can do, but the chat interface wasn’t originally designed for this.”OpenAI says GPT-Image 1.5 runs up to four times faster than its predecessor.pic.twitter.com/PwG1F4TT6Q— OpenAI December 16, 2025The company also claims the model follows instructions more closely, especially during iterative edits.Users can now add or remove objects, change visual styles, adjust clothing, and refine specific areas without regenerating the entire image.That level of control addresses a long-standing...

title: York County Commissioners propose reduced 2026 tax increase in revised budget
content: A revised 2026 budget, announced on Tuesday by York County commissioners, includes a lower tax increase than was originally proposed. A revised 2026 budget, announced on Tuesday by York County commissioners, includes a lower tax increase than was originally proposed. The revised budget includes a 0.65-mill increase in county real estate tax, which represents a 9. 4% increase over the 2025 rate, a decrease from the 14% increase announced in November, the county announced in a release.The 2026 budget represents the first tax increase in the county, coming after three consecutive years with no tax increases through 2024 and a 2025 budget that included a $4 million expense cut, the release noted. “The budget process is a continuous cycle, which is why the budget we announced in November is considered a preliminary budget,” said York County President Commissioner Julie Wheeler. “We have been transparent from the start that a tax increase was likely to be necessary due to a range of factors beyond the county’s control. But staff has worked hard to find savings and cuts costs, allowing us to reduce the overall tax increase while still ensuring we are properly funding county services.” The 2026 revised budget of $751.3 million represents an 8% increase from the 2025 budget, according to a county spokesperson.“While no one wants to see higher taxes, we also need to make sure we’re properly funding county services – many of which are mandated by the state. title: Man in custody after hours-long standoff involving Parma Heights Police
content: Digital content producer at News 5 A man is in custody after a standoff involving Parma Heights Police that lasted about six hours on Tuesday afternoon.Around 9:25 a.m., officers responded to the 9800 block of West Ridgewood Drive after a caller witnessed a man assaulting a woman, police said. Upon arrival, officers located the victim and learned that an 18-month-old child was inside the residence with the alleged suspect, police said.The man barricaded himself in the home and refused to comply with officers' orders, police said. The initial investigation revealed that he was possibly armed with a firearm.The Southwest Enforcement Bureau SWAT Team was activated, and its negotiators communicated with the man, who still refused to comply and held the child hostage, police said.Around 3 p.m., officers were able to take the man into custody and rescue the child, who was turned over to a parent, police said.The man was charged with one count of domestic violence and one count of disrupting public service, police said. A grand jury may add additional charges at a later time.During the standoff, West Ridgewood Drive near Denison Boulevard was blocked but has since been reopened.Additionally, the Parma City School District placed a nearby school on a precautionary soft lockdown after police sent an alert to area residents about the standoff. Once officers spoke with school staff, the lockdown was lifted.The man is expected to be arraigned in Parma Municipal Court on Wednesday. We...

title: FTX insider Caroline Ellison has been quietly moved out of prison
content: Business Insider tells the global tech, finance, stock market, media, economy, lifestyle, real estate, AI and innovative stories you want to know. Caroline Ellison, the former cryptocurrency executive and ex-girlfriend of Sam Bankman-Fried , has been quietly moved out of federal lockup after serving roughly 11 months of her two-year prison sentence, Business Insider has learned. Ellison, 31, was transferred on October 16 from the Danbury Federal Correctional Institution in Connecticut to what's known as community confinement, a Federal Bureau of Prisons spokesperson said.That means Ellison, the former CEO of Bankman-Fried's Alameda Research cryptocurrency hedge fund, remains in federal custody but is now either in home confinement or a halfway house, BOP spokesperson Randilee Giamusso told Business Insider."For privacy, safety, and security reasons, we do not discuss the conditions of confinement for any individual, including reasons for transfers or release plans, nor do we specify an individual's specific location while in community confinement," Giamusso said.Online prison records list Ellison's projected release date as February 20, 2026 — nearly nine months early. Her attorneys declined to comment for this story.Ellison reported to the low-security Danbury prison in early November 2024 to serve a two-year sentence she received for her role in the massive multibillion-dollar fraud scheme that led to the collapse of Bankman-Fried's business empire.She had pleaded guilty...

'We've got to get it right.'SOR has been proven to be the best way to educate children, he said. As the individual crossed Hope Street, less than a block from where a police cruiser with its emergency lights flashing was seen pulling up and stopping on Hope Street near the scene of the shooting, the Barus & Holley Engineering building. Objects that are outdoors should be secured and caution should be taken if driving.Sustained, strong winds are possible. Secure loose outdoor items and adjust plans as necessary so you’re not caught outside.Identify an interior room of your house, such as a basement or interior bathroom, that you can take shelter in during high wind warnings. title: The Key Spring/Summer 2026 Trends You Can Already Shop
content: From rich textures to elegant silhouettes, these are the spring 2026 fashion trends that will define the season ahead. The spring/summer 2026 collections arrived with a palpable sense of excitement, and for a good reason. This season marked a true industry reset, with nearly 15 newly appointed creative directors debuting their visions and setting the tone for the spring/summer 2026 trends across the major fashion houses. The overarching sentiment was expressive, celebratory, and deeply personal—driven by individuality and the pure joy of getting dressed. The Top Spring/Summer 2026 Fashion Trends One of the season’s leading themes was “fashion as feeling”—a fitting sentiment not only captured in the movement of the clothes as designers experimented with tactile textures and proportion, but also the emotional finale of Mathieu Blazy’s Chanel debut, when Awar Odhiang closed the show with a smile so bright it lit up the entire Grand Palais. A certain kind of soft, relaxed elegance was also explored this season, characterized by scarf styling and fluid, draped shapes for an overall look that felt sophisticated yet undone. Prep’s moment continues, with an emphasis on color and practical layering that feels apt for transitional dressing, and a little more expressive than uniform. The spring/summer 2026 collections pick up where we left off in the fall, with personality-driven looks rooted in wearability. Think of it as real-life dressing with a flourish. title: Brown University shooting latest: New video released as officials seek public’s help identifying suspect
content: Authorities released several new videos Monday of the man suspected in Saturday’s mass shooting inside of a Brown classroom, which killed two students and wounded nine others. The search continued Tuesday for the suspect in a shooting at Brown University on Dec. 13 after a person of interest was released from custody.Additional police were sent to Providence schools on Tuesday to reassure worried parents that their kids will be safe with the Brown University shooter on the loose and no indication yet that investigators have zeroed in on a suspect. A new video was released on Tuesday. During a press conference, Oscar Perez, Providence's chief of police, showed the video to the reporters."So, as you can see, the enhanced photos, there's enhanced video footage," Perez said. "And so we're asking the public to ensure that they can see them... Watch body movements, the way the person moved their arms, their body posture, the way they work, they're carrying their weight. I think those are important movement patterns that we help you identify this individual, which is extremely important." On Tuesday, the Mayor of Providence, Brett Smiley, also gave an update on the health status of the survivors. Of the seven victims that were still in the hospital, one was in critical status, five were in critical but stable status, and one was in stable status. title: Outgoing Cleveland Heights Councilwoman Davida Russell plans to run again -- for the statehouse
content: Davida Russell hopes to take Cleveland Heights with her to Columbus in 2027. Cleveland Heights Council Vice President Davida Russell addresses her colleagues Dec. 1, when a mayor’s proclamation turned out to be just a prelude to her final meeting this week. There, Russell also announced plans to seek the District 18 state representative's seat next year, which would include Cleveland Heights in her representation. CLEVELAND HEIGHTS, Ohio -- Prior to the final meeting of her six-year tenure on City Council, Davida Russell promised some big things to come.She emphasized that while she’s leaving city government, she hopes to take Cleveland Heights -- and an assortment of other municipalities -- with her to Columbus in 2027. “Tonight, I am announcing that I am running for Ohio representative, District 18,” Russell said amid a great deal of fanfare. As it turned out, Interim Mayor Tony Cuda’s proclamation honoring Russell earlier this month proved to be a prelude of more yet to come. Additional proclamations arrived from U.S. Rep. Shontel Brown, Gov. Mike DeWine, Cuyahoga County Executive Chris Ronayne and County Councilman Michael Houser. Russell, who served as City Council vice president for the past two years, received a bouquet of roses presented during roughly a dozen testimonials.An admittedly humbled and grateful Russell said the moment itself was not a goodbye, but rather a farewell to one chapter and the beginning of another. title: Doctor Found Dead Naked in Dollar Tree Freezer: Investigation Underway
content: A 32-year-old female doctor was found dead and naked inside a freezer at a Dollar Tree store in Miami, Florida. Police are investigating the circumstances surrounding the death, which is currently described as an accident, while the family are raising funds to repatriate her body to Nicaragua. Details are still being gathered as investigations are ongoing. The Miami Police Department is investigating the death of a 32-year-old female doctor, Helen Massiell Garay Sanchez, who was found dead and reportedly naked inside a walk-in freezer at a Dollar Tree store in Little Havana, Miami , Florida. The discovery was made by a Dollar Tree employee early Sunday morning, around 8 a.m., during opening hours. Public Information Officer Michael Vega confirmed that the deceased was located within the store's stockroom, specifically inside a cooler. Initial reports, citing police scanners, indicated that Sanchez was found without clothes. The circumstances surrounding her death are currently under investigation, and authorities have stated that surveillance footage appears to suggest no foul play was involved. The investigation is ongoing, and investigators are attempting to determine why Sanchez entered the restricted stockroom area. The case has raised numerous questions and prompted a response from the community, highlighting the tragic nature of the incident and the need for a thorough investigation to ascertain the exact cause of death and the events leading up to it.
